title: Welcome to use Notebook! - Nov5 20:31
description:
Notebook is an essential assistant for you to record your mind and make your life organized by notebook. Whether being added in the software or dragged from the widget, notepad allows you to create and save your notes quickly. You could easily add notes, checklists, photos, and sort your notes by colors in different notebooks as well as search them whenever needed.

You can use all basic features of settings front size, layout view as, sorting order and batch selection but also archive your notes share with friends family, add a reminder pin on the top place it home screen retrieve deleted ones! Last not least you could export to PC computer backup transfer new devices!

If have any questions or advices please feel free to contact us we will do our best develop Quick Notes hope enjoy better recording in life!

title: The New Fast
description: On 29 April 2020, the Holy Spirit asked me a question during a ministration. He asked if I would fast 3 days per week and deny myself food for 36hr a week after asking him to examine part of me that I've not given up to Him.

title: Endnote on 2nd Quarter Fast
description: On 3 May 2020, I ended my 21days fast with Jesus giving me this closing instruction. The Holy Spirit will lead you into all truth. This he told me when I asked him for the instructions to do henceforth. He told that as I go along with him, things will become clearer. That the Holy Spirit will keep unveiling them to me. The instructions will come by the Holy Spirit he said. During the fast, Jesus told me a whole lot of things concerning my life, family, purpose and destiny. He made it clearer to me that he is with me always even to the end of time. He made me understand that I can't fail, not when I'm with him. My destiny is tied to Jesus, he is the only one who can fulfill my destiny.

title: Intercession Progression
description:
On 27 April 2020, the lord has activated a grace in me. I can now see the pictures of people to pray for and there conditions.

I can even smell their perfume. I saw people of my past that I wasn't thinking about; the Holy Spirit directed me on what to pray for them.

title: What's in your hand
description: On 22 April 2020, Jesus told me that what I have doesn't matter, but what it can produce. This happened on my way back from cedar's barbershop.

title: Unfathomable Love
description:
On 20 April 2020, Jesus told me that I meant everything to him. I was shocked, because I couldn't comprehend it. So he told me that it was why he had to sacrifice his life for my sake, so that he wouldn't lose me.

He told me that he didn't die for any other creation but man. He told me that he didn't die for angels but for me.

He asked me what could be so important to him that he decided to sacrifice his life? That it was because of the love he has for man.

title: Spiritual Energy - Wind Power Generation Site Seen at @2pm, My Time with God.
description: On 13 April 2020, when I started my fasting I saw a wind power generation site. A wind turbines turning in an open field.

title: Money for his kingdom
description: On 23 July 2020, the lord told me that the finances he'll be routing through my hands will be for building his people and his projects for his next move. That he isn't giving me these money for my own use but for his kingdom. In fact, he told me that all that I'll need will come from others.

title: Write This Down
description: On 9 January 2021, Write this down says the Lord, "I'm bringing a job to you. This job is going to put some fortune in your hands and help you startup your life with glory." By 2022 both of you will get married and this well-paying job will be a sign to this word. Note that this job is not where I'm taking you financially, but it will give you the resources to fuel the process to get there.

title: As Surely As The Lord Lives - Financial Manifestation Pledge
description:
On 12 November 2020, as I walked down for a reach out. I again, pled with the Lord to hasting the manifestation of his promises in my life especially with my finances.

I told him that I'm doing what he told me to do and I'm willing to go wherever he wanted me to go. There isn't a day that the thoughts of his promises for me doesn't cross my mind.
Deep within me I heard this phrase stating: "As surely as the Lord lives, you will be rich". This was a serious phrase used to swear an oath binding one to his commitment to perform a task. 1 Kings 17:13, 1 Kings 2:24 2 Kings 4:30, 2 Sam 12:5
I later found this scripture that best explained what God was saying to me.
The Passion Translation Hebrews 6:13 Now when God made a promise to Abraham, since there was no one greater than himself, he swore an oath on his own integrity to keep the promise as sure as God exists!

title: The Remote Job Request
description: On 5 December 2020, I asked the Lord for a Job as a remote software developer by a Canadian employer with high earning benefits as well as a flexible schedule for his kingdom advancement. Immediately I made this prayer, the lord spoke to my heart saying, "this prayer will not go unanswered." He told me to start with a research on how to get the job.

title: The Supernatural Takes Over
description:
On 21 October 2020, the Lord updated me on our financial plan. He told me that he is going to cause situations that will enable me to profit financially. Then he will also come and help me fulfill them.

That he is going to instruct me on the people I will be giving money to. That I must do it under his instructions.

That if I give to someone he is not instructing me to give, that I'll still get a reward but not as much as I should under his direct instruction.

title: End of Money Praying
description: On 21 January 2021, the day 4 of five night of glory I told the Lord that I need a word from him that will change my world especially with my finances. As the word of God was being dispatched from the mouth of David Ibiyeomie on finances I heard the Holy Spirit tell me this: "If you really love God you shouldn't be praying for money, you just need to do the things he told you. There is no place in the Bible where a person prayed for money." This came as a shock to me because it is absolutely true. I've read the whole of the Bible and never has it been that a patriarch or an individual asked God for money. It's not against biblical principles to pray for what you want God to do for you, but by following them one will get all his needs met financially. All I need to pray for are ideas, understanding, and grace to carry out the kingdom's financial principles. Also, in all times that Lord has spoken about finances with me he never told me to pray for my finances; instead He gives instructions on what to do about them. Even asked myself if I've had money while praying for it? For sure this word will last through life.

title: Incoming Finances and Warfare with Evil Spirits
description: On 1 November 2020, the Lord said to me "your finances are coming." This was when I saw many people getting breakthrough in their finances via testimonies on a Sunday service. Momentarily, I wondered why I'm performing what God told me to do in teaching, giving, and doing his bidding and still having delays. I now realized that I'm in a warfare between evil spirits and me. And the Lord saw my thoughts and spoke the truth to me. This blocked me from considering their lies. Immediately I was reminded of TB Joshua's teaching on not focusing on the issues. Meanwhile, in the Hosanna praise service, the Lord reinforced my faith by the prophetic words from Pst. David Ibeyomie. Expect supernatural publicity as you engage in Hosanna praise. Furthermore, he started telling me how he is making a mess of all the devils that where in my lineage. He told me that he was picking a fight with them and rubbishing them by my warfare in giving.

title: Frugal & Frugality
description:
On 27 September 2020, I heard the word frugal and frugality while trying to complete a sentence in my heart. When I checked it out, I found out that it meant:

To be careful about spending money or using things when you do not need to. It also meant to use money or supplies in a very careful way.

Immediately I decoded the word, I understood what the lord has been doing in my life concerning finances. 

I had just spread my money across many places, even to the last penny; it was a new way of investing money for me. And also to avoid spending on things I can do without or don't immediately need. Also to avoid using supplies when I don't need to.

title: The Wealthy Place
description: On 4 December 2020, I had this assurance in my heart that the Lord is going to put me in a place of access to finances on the earth. What he has been doing all this while with me is to lay the foundation and the channels of cash flow so that when I'm brought to the wealthy place, the flow will be easy.

title: Supernatural Finances Commence
description:
On 24 November 2020, the Finances Jesus told me about started coming. It started as a Job I was called for by my lecturer in college who go by the name Dr. Constance.

A deal for the job was cut at #30,000 to build a traffic offense system. And the Holy Spirit gave me the quote for the job. #20,000 was instantly sent to my account to commence the Job and I was so embarrassed with God's blessing.

title: The Investor Mentality
description: On 3 July 2020, the Lord Jesus told me during our intimacy session that all I need to see changes in my finances is an investor mentality. He got me meditating on the following scriptures. Eccl 5:10-11, 11:2,6,24-26 Heb 13:5

title: Kingdom Advancement Prayers
description: On 21 July 2020, I had this inspiration to start making kingdom advancement prayers for wealth transfer and also to transform all Winners chapel kingdom advancement prayers to actually cover the entire body of Christ. On 7 October 2020, The Lord has been reminding me to make the KAP presentations to mobile friendly. This I will share during reach out in the GoShop platform. These prayers will also teach new believers how pray effective prayers.

title: The T-shirt Idea
description: On 15 September 2020, The Lord told me that I will be given T-shirt brand ideas to make ready. They will come like images, logo, and texts. My job prepare them in ready illustrator by first drawing them on paper and pencil before translating to the digital version. These T-shirts are going to promote the Gospel.

title: The Mentors Platform
description: On 17 July 2020, I had an idea to create a learning platform like audacity and LCD, where I'll teach and sell my premium content to my audience.

title: Fantastic SMS Reminder
description: On 12 June, 2020 the Lord reminded me to work on a bulk SMS app called Fantastic SMS. It will become a tool that many people will use for sending bulk SMS to their new converts and invitees. He also told me that the money I've been saving will be invested in this app. And I should tell people about it wherever I go, sensitizing them of its usefulness.

title: The Dating Plan
description:
On 11 March 2021, the Lord gave me a plan on how to build my relationship with Glory. This happened after I've been pondering on how I could maintain the visits.

The monthly visitations of glory is not going to work. Instead do a two months interval visits. 

Each time you visit, stay a week, go on a date with her for the day, talk about your lives, your future with her, the vision of the union, the boundaries of the union, encourage each other, make happy memories, and more. 

Doing the above will strengthen your bond with her and deliver a full emersion of experience along with satisfaction and also leaving a longing for the next meet up. This will also maintain a friendly frequency in your appearance in Nworieubi.

title: Wedding Title Deed and Startup Vision
description: On 25 February 2021, while coming back from GTC the Holy Ghost started speaking to me precisely about my wedding and the startup of my new home with Glory. He gave me glimpse of how that startup will look like because of his hands. He expanded my mind to see the endless possibilities to which he could get things done for me so quickly. He went ahead and commonized the wedding funding as if it was nothing at all and wanted me not to worry about it. He wants me to understand that it would take him nothing to have the funds available for me and glory. Afterwards, I saw our startup as a couple, I saw our wedding attire. I saw that we first rented an apartment for our startup. I saw that while I'm working on the computer, glory is handling a side business. I saw our oneness and it was amazing. The reality and possibility of our wedding coming to pass increased to its overflow in my heart and faith came alive in me the more. I saw that the Holy Spirit has all these things arranged for me and he is saying, "all you need to do is just follow his instructions." I saw that the new Job placement he is bringing to me will put things in a stable mode allowing us to plan our lives properly in our new home. The Lord has all these covered and paid in full, and doesn't want us to worry about it at all.

title: Time Together with Glory
description:
On 18 February 2021, glory and I had another chance to spend together. In our time together we admitted that we were exactly what we've asked God for and even much better. To us, it felt like a dream that we met in this life-time. We held each other's hands thanking God for hours. I'm so in love with glory that I've confessed many times to her.

Within the middle of our conversation, she paused and told me that she loves me too. There was joy, peace, and love everywhere and the presence of Lord was very strong that I started speaking to glory by inspiration from Holy Spirit for a long time describing future us how we'll look like what'll we function etc.

We were so in love that we joined our heads together held our faces kissed each other on forehead cleaned tears also took some picture. We prayed and rededicated relationship with God dedicated ourselves too others. At the end of this wonderful experience I escorted glory halfway to her house before going back office work.

title: The Golden Glorious Yes
description: On 16 February 2021, glory finally gave me the golden glorious yes after spending three days with her in Nworieubi. I was so happy even as we dedicated our relationship to God. This happened after two months of waiting and praying for her response.

title: Troubleshooting Us - On 25 September 2020, during my quiet time with the Holy Spirit, he told me something about Glory and I.
description:
I was asking him if I should cut off from her or stay in sync. Because my patience tank was reducing to an intolerable level. But the Holy Spirit told me not to cut off, I was asking for his will.

He told me that the Word will change her mind and make her a wonderful help meet for me. Whereas my patience will keep her and get me to enjoy her.

He told me that she can't handle emotions well, whereas my patience level needs high upgrades.

He told me that Glory is his daughter, that she just need the Word to renew her mind, but for me I need to enlarge my coast of patience.

title: The New Year Catch Up
description: On 26 December 2020, I saw pictures of catching up for a lunch and most importantly to see each other for the new year. This happened when I went to retrieve my statement of result from IMO state.

title: The Rebekah Code
description:
On 5 October 2020, I found this key concerning finding a good spouse. The keys to finding a good spouse are as follow:

One, the person must come from the household of faith.
Two, the person must have a servant spirit.
Three, the person cannot be sexually loosed.

title: The Speaking Test with Glory
description: On 6 December 2020, while thinking about my IELTS speaking test practice partner I the Holy Spirit told me to do that with Glory.

title: The Contentions
description:
On 8 November 2020, I received a call from a strange line, and it turns out that his name is Zion. Before I picked up the call, I asked who has good news for me when I saw the call.

After he greeted me, he revealed a secret to me that I thought was a lie. He told me that Glory and him were in a relationship, and was pleading to me to back off. Still waiting for my confirmation to back off, I said that may the Lord's will prevail. And he thanked me and ended the call. He probably doesn't understand what I said but tomorrow he will be shocked that agreed to a wrong deal.

There was peace in my heart, so I just laughed at the enemy for orchestrating this behind. For the Lord has given me his word, and I'm not backing off for any reason. For the Lord is with me, he told me that himself, and I've his Word and Spirit to create and destroy using my mouth.

But it was very funny that enemy will proceed further in that direction, I had a good laugh, because I'm using the ways of the Lord now and its higher than the ways any man or devil.

title: Reconnected Us
description: On 14 October 2020, after a long period of disconnection between me and glory, the lord answered my prayers and brought us to communications again. The reason for the disconnect isn't clear except for the part that it has to do with a defeated hindering spirit. Just in a short while our conversations have gotten stronger; we are getting to understand each other's character, and the will of God is being done to improve us for his glory!

title: Teaching Glory the Word On October 15, 2020 I Saw The Lord Show Me That I Should Start Teaching Her The Word Of Recent.
description: I'm gonna have to teach her verses after verses and Holy Spirit revealed chapters and verses.

title: My Birthday Gift
description: On 16 September 2020, I asked the Holy Spirit for help concerning Glory after he told me not to be disconnected from her. He told me to call victor and tell him to inform Glory of my birthday on Thursday and also tell her that I will be calling her on Friday before the all night time.

title: The Love Coach
description: On 1 September 2020, while I was on my way to take a shit, I thought about Glory, and how much I really Loved her. I wanted to give her a gift and get to talk with her at least once a week.

title: I wish to speak with you too, Glory.
description: On 6 September 2020, the Holy Spirit told me to send this message to Glory, "I wish to speak with you too, Glory." This happened after I believed his word that he was going to help me get Glory.

title: Prophecy on purpose
description:
On 9 April, 2020 Prophet Godwin brought this words from the lord to me concerning my purpose. It is to:

1. Depopulating the kingdom of darkness.
Matt 6:33
2. Training and Teaching.
Rom 12:7
3. Executing charitable deeds.
2 Cor 9:8

title: Travel Visa Ready
description: On 28 May 2020, I received a Prophecy from mummy Helene that I am one of the three persons travel passports have been given to. She told me that father wants me to have it, that I've sacrificed a lot and he is rewarding me. She said that I can choose any country I wanted. This also verified the bunch of dreams and visions I've had from God regarding my travel to Canada. Prophet Godwin also said I will be traveling out of the country as well.

title: I Met A Prophet
description:
He said that I was close to my mum, that I love her.

He said that by 31 I will have a wife and family of two children.

He said I will have great access to finances by then.

He gave me a warning about women, that I should work with God to get married.

He said I have the Healing grace on my left palm.

He said I was very sensitive in the spirit.

title: The Lord Has Promoted You
description: On 16 May 2021, I heard the Lord speak through Kevin Zadai. The Lord has promoted you and you've matured to the place where he trusts you with greater things. You don't even know how close you're to that breakthrough to your next step.

title: You've Passed Your Test
description: On 13 May 2021, I received these words through Kevin Zadai. You can't fit into that narrow way again, you've passed your test. Their is such freedom (Free Domiciliary) waiting for you. You're not bound anymore, you're free.

title: Words of the Spirit - On 30 April 2021, I heard the following words from the Spirit.
description:
You are now in your season of appearing. The reason you're in this Season is because of the hard work you've done.

Their will be rascal trained operators for Jesus in every region from now onwards.
Praise God for half the regular three hours you pray in the day.

title: Prophetic Vision and Spiritual Guidance
description: I saw a garden cutter, and the lord spoke to my heart that he is cutting off every attachments that is not allowing us to bear much fruits. I saw a land to air missile, and this is a weapon for fighting enemies on the air from the ground. This happened when we started blasting in the spirit and secreting the atmosphere with the blood of Jesus. The lord is speaking victory over our lives as I saw a trophy while we were praying. He further reminded me of the first prophetic word on people hatching out from their shell. The Holy Spirit is saying to us that to be carnally minded is death, but to be spiritually minded is life. He said that some of us here are just being a spectator; he wants everyone to engage. I saw us being directed by the Holy Spirit as a man in a white robe to worship God better. He was the conductor and we were the orchestra.

title: Father Is Pleased With Me
description:
On 12 February 2021, Sir Niza related with me a dream he had about my dad stating:

In my dream a man came to me claiming that he is my dad, he had a discuss with me saying that he is proud of Darlington and wants me to keep up the good works. 

This dream is very significant to me and for sure I wouldn't have believed this man if he came to me in my dreams. This is because of my uncertainties concerning my dads salvation, hence, I would've concluded that he is a devil camouflaging as my dad.

However Niza gave me two warnings regarding my state of mind:
- Don't conclude on anyone. This is because I really don't know if he accepted Jesus in the course of his life or not.
- Dads in dreams means God the Father. This could also mean that the Father is pleased with me.

title: Spirit Inspired Declaration
description: On 6 February 2021, I was moved by the Lord to make this declaration about our land in Ahoada of which had evoked some contentions the evil one. Oh land hear my voice, fight those that fight the will of God for you. Never agree with those that are not agreeing with the will of God for you. Let the Lord's will prevail over every decision made or to be made about you. Let the words of the evil one over you falls like a rotten fruit from a tree by the wind, may you go deaf over the voice of those working against God. May all that the Lord told me about you come to pass. Let the Spirit of justice be the only voice that you listen to. All these I decree in Jesus name!

title: Words Of My Mentor On February 4, 2021 - Consider Your Move to Canada as Mission Work and Advancing Career; Don't Be Possessive or Sacrifice for Woman at Expense of Lord; Trust No One's Promised Inputs but Budget Yourself; Pray Financially; Interpret Early Waking Citations
description: On 4 February 2021, Ebenezar gave me the following words of advise. Consider your move to Canada as a mission work to help people in that country and also to advance your career. Don't think of the woman as your property, and be not possessive of her. Don't sacrifice anything for the woman at the expense of the Lord. Don't trust anyone's promised inputs for your wedding, budget for the resources yourself. Ask the Lord that the time has come for the lifting of my family financially, that he should put good money in my hands. If you're awoken early cit means that a matter came early and God wants you to get something done. Ebenezer spoke these blessings over my life and laid a hand on me and the following transpired: Blessings of wealth access; Blessings of spiritual power; Blessings of intelligence; Prayed for a spiritual financial key that will keep me buoyant.; Directed me to organize all related dreams into facts and clues.; Recommended that I seek out confirmation dreams before proceedings. Said that it is Father's himself wanting me to move to Canada.

title: Word Validity - Lord's Question on Doubt and Glory
description: On 18 January 2021, the Lord asked me these question when I began to doubt the truthfulness of his word for glory. 'Son, why do you always doubt my word? I said I'm not sure, then he said, I'm in you and you're in me, for you can do nothing without me, even the word you speak are not yours. If you remain in me and my word remain in you, then you can ask for what you want and it shall be yours.' Jesus is the word of God in me and when I speak in the spirit its him speaking.

title: The VP Sign Post
description:
On 27 November 2020, I went to county to continue my teaching on GoShop. I came in contact with the Vice Principal of the school.

At first, she wasn't pleased that I was teaching the students without an official permission from the head of the school. She called me to her office and after I've communicated my intention to her, she redirected me to the principal so I can settle things with him. Still on the discussion before I left her office, she told me something that sparked me. She made the following statement to me.

'Ive seen you and you have a future. You're smart and intelligent, you know where you're going in life.' As she made the statement, I could tell that the Spirit of God had given her a vision of me. I understood from her words that I'm moving in the right direction and that meeting with her was another sign post to me indicating that I'm in the perfect will of God.

Yesterday being 26 November 2020, the Holy Spirit had just guided me to my next teaching spot in GTC Ahoada. Even while the principal the VP were giving me reasons why I can't teach the students in county anymore. The Lord was just bringing back pictures to my mind with those students I saw in GTC. Those students were the ones that boarded in school.

title: Preparing for Canada
description: On 1 December 2020, the Lord spoke to me through Sir Niza that I must start preparing for Canada. This happened after I had finished praying in the morning hour, I told God to brief me for the day. After a few minutes I received a call from my mentor who is a man of God. He stressed a lot on my movement to Canada and my kingdom work.

title: The Moving Out
description: On 18 January 2021, the Lord spoke to me concerning glory's discission to leave her aunt's house. The Lord is with you on this move glory, "this is the next step to your freedom. Your aunt will try to change your mind by all means but stick to your discission. Pharaoh let my people go is the parallel of this next phase of your life. The Lord wants you to be free so you can serve and worship him." I will protect you and be with you all the way, I will never leave you says the Lord. Regarding what you need to do for your finances, provisions has already been made for that, you just have to trust me on this. Do you really want to be free? This is your time you show that hunger says the Lord.

title: Choosing a Spouse - Mummy Oluchi Advice
description: Mummy Oluchi advised me to not seek out for courtship that I should ask the lord to show me my God's ordained wife when the time comes. She also said that I should learn to be unshakable in times of adversity especially when it has to do with finances and persecutions, that I should stick with God no matter what situation I find myself, I should never bow. That she made mention in one of our meetings that God may give me a woman that didn't go to school like I did. She also said not look at degree when it comes to the woman God is preparing for me. And mentioned The Holy Spirit as my primary source of insight.

title: Pastor Advice - Job and Marriage Direction
description: He told me not to quit my job, so long as its not obstructing me from developing in my calling until God tells me to stop. And he also said that I shouldn't fix my mind on a particular woman right now but should be someone interested in the vision I'm being called for by God.

title: Shop Owner's Advice - Women and Marriage Vision
description: The shop owner opposite us spoke to me about women. She told me that their ain't much good woman in the world, for genuine one I've seen I should keep in touch with her and also train her.

title: Mummy Helen's Marriage Advice - Young Age Consideration
description: She advised me to not think I'm too young for marriage, that I need to get married so won't fall into temptations. She also spoke of compatibility and being guided by the Holy Spirit.

title: The Covenant
description:
On December 5, I made a covenant with God and this is how it goes:
Lord I do not have any valuable thing worth giving to you, I have searched myself. Their is only one thing worth giving to you, and that is me.

My vow to you is to promote your kingdom while I'm on earth with all I have. This is my vow to you. In my life time I'll serve your purpose for my life and listen to you as much as I can by your Spirit.
And here is what i want from you, the promises you have made in my life. The promises of greatness, riches, great health, access and influence. And I am not waiting till you bless me with all these, I am going ahead to do what you have told me and trust that you will do your own part.

title: Prophetic Instruction - Get a box, anoint it with your PC inside and declare that as you open this box to receive your PC that's how you'll soon be opening a new box to receive your HP Zbook studio g5 x360.
Ambassador Job Request and Assurance from Lord
description: On 1 September 2020, on a bike to get to Port Harcourt park in Ahoada, I was asking the lord for a job since my current job wasn't bringing in contracts. I knew this was not the Lord's will but my mum had been confronting me with that question. I wasn't specific enough and so the Lord asked me what kind of Job I want to have. After thinking deep about it I told him that I wanted a job at the embassy to Canada 🇨🇦 I could almost tell that he was grinning 😁 at me. He told me that I was already an ambassador. He made me understand that I was representing him. Before returning to Ahoada, the Lord had already told me that if I take my assignment as my job, then I will never lack a thing. Of a truth, I've never lacked a thing since I've been in Ahoada doing what he told me. Thanks to him on that part, but I also want to be able to support my family financially as well. This is my request to the Lord. Although he has assured me that I'll live in abundance of wealth, even as he is working through me.

title: Time is short for me.
description: On 6 October 2020, Sir Niza under the inspiration of the Holy Spirit told me that the time is short for me. That I may think that I've got a long time to be here and doing what I'm doing, but its not. He said that I should do everything from now onward as if I'm leaving tomorrow! He also said to me that I should treasure what God is doing through me above all else and not to take it lightly.

title: Prophetic Word of The Lord On Money Will Come Knocking At Your Door, Call You And Overtake You If You Listen To My Words Of Righteousness.
description: On 15 September 2020, the Lord spoke these ordercious words to me. You'll be shocked when money will come knocking at your door, money will call you on the phone and you'll answer. Then you'll know that I'm the Lord and that my word is true. All these will chase after you and overtake you if you will listen and obey what i'm telling you. Continue seeking after my kingdom and righteousness. I didn't make man to chase after blessings, i made blessings to chase after a man who chases after me.

title: Uncountable Word
description: On 9 April 2020, God says through prophet Godwin that the words he has put in my mouth are uncountable, just like the grandnuts I ate with him.

title: Word For Mom
description: On 12 August 2020, I had a word from the Lord to my mother, "I'm the lord, is their anything too hard for me? By this time next year your sons will be born again"

title: Prophetic words on the Lord's lightening of our spirits and a line of buffets filled with various foods.
description: On 24 July 2020, the Lord routed the following prophetic words through me. While we were worshipping I saw a candle 🕯 stick lighted and the lord said he is lightening the our spirits. The bible said that the spirit of a man is the candle of the Lord. While asking for a word from heaven, God showed me a line of buffets filled with foods of various kinds.

title: Prophetic words on the blood bowl and connection with my presence.
description: On 17 July 2020, the Lord routed the following prophetic words through me. I saw a gold bowl containing the blood. And the lord's words came to me that the blood is speaking for us concerning the accusations of the evil one. Until you all understand how to connect to my presence you will still fall short of my glory. Every thing has to be in harmony. The Holy Spirit wants us to connect to his power right now!

title: Prophetic words on spiritual energy and intelligence for the church.
description: On 9 July 2020, the Lord routed the following prophetic words through me. The Lord is speaking to me about spiritual energy for the church. The energy that allows one to continue after exceeding his strength. Immediately we gathered, the Holy Spirit was waiting for us already. He is still trying to let us know that these meetings should be about him, that we should let him do things his ways and not become used to a certain pattern. Light up!!! He is speaking to me about spiritual intelligence for the church. That he was not responsible for all those bad things that happened to you. That he is a good father. The Lord is packing out filthiness from amongst us as we worship as I saw a packer discarding dirt outside the church door. I've been seeing a lamp around. The lord is saying that its by his word that we filter out the things of the spirit. That his word like a lamp that guides us from stumbling, especially for those whose gifts have just been activated!

title: Lord's Prophetic Words on Embracing Gifting and Priorities
description: On 19 June 2020, the Lord routed the following prophetic words through my mouth. Some of you here need to embrace the conditions that kicks start your gifting. You've been dodging, no more dodging, allow yourself to be used in the area that brings your gifts to manifestation. Gloria, the lord says that he has made you with what it takes to sing down his presence, his glory. That you should come closer. This happened on that last song you sang; I saw a cloudy atmosphere representing God's presence. The Lord is also speaking of incorrect priorities. He said our primary priority is him and his kingdom. And he wants everyone here to be on fire. And he wants people to stand in gap for their families, friends, relatives, colleagues more.

title: Prophetic Words of Deliverance and Holiness
description:
The lord routed the following prophetic words through my mouth. The lord is singing a song of deliverance over you who is troubled. He is promising you that he is your hiding place.

The lord warning us about inconsistency. He said that some of us are not consistent in the walk with him.

The lord is speaking about Holiness. It’s to be set apart, it’s to be owned by God. That you were bought with a price of blood. You don’t take what is of God and join to a prostitute.

The lord says that some of you here feel like you're not special because you have not been called out; the lord tells us we should do things he has already told us.

The Lord wants you to use this prophecy over your life as weapons of warfare. 1 Tim 1:18

Cure for inconsistency priority. Matt 6:33

title: LFC Baptism
description: I saw a cloud texture. I saw a medal 🎖 I saw a screw driver. I saw a bottle of wine. I saw a left ear. I saw a wind blower. I saw a key. I saw a white pair of wings blowing the winds to the church workers while mummy was praying. I keep seeing fire burning in the eyes of my mind.

title: Lord's Guidance and Revelations at LFC Nworiube Meeting on June 5, 2020
description: On 5 June 2020, the lord gave me the following words for the night meeting at LFC Nworiube. A hand stretched to help out. A hand to raise one up from a kneeling position. The lord is painting some people's life here; I saw a painting brush while worshipping God. To the instrumentalists, God is empowering you already to play down his presence. God is asking about three women that were supposed to be here tonight. He said this youth alive will make us one but bad eggs have to go away. His presence should always aim for in these meetings; everything good present there with him. I saw a cloudy atmosphere, the arrival of God's presence was felt. Smoking addiction can now cure as seen through cigarette being discarded by someone who used it before meeting God. A digger digging out something buried is also noted here indicating removal or uncovering hidden things against themself are coming to light. The lord showed me a rose flower saying he loves you and makes one feel alone, implying deep personal connection despite apparent solitude; new seeds given for growth in fruitfulness were seen as well. David needs baptism of the Holy Spirit so that his fire can be ignited like others who have received it before him. Two fresh alter ministers are to learn how to grow a church.

title: The Marin spirit
description:
On 6 April 2021, while I was fishing along the coast line of my village, their were no people around there. 
I saw a skinny dark-skinned woman come out of the water naked. She had every features of a woman except that she has a penis instead of a virgina. 
Immediately I knew that she was a marine spirit. She went out of the water and into the community and was talking to people. She saw me but had no business with me, she wasn't ashamed of the fact that she is both naked and has a man's panis. The Lord inspired me to know that this is the spirit that has brought darkness over my community that no one is allowed to prosper. And he wants me to pray for my community.

title: The Tree of Life
description:
On 11 November 2019, In my dream I was in a dangerous world. I and my family found a hiding place inside of a tree. I recurrently go into this tree to get away from all the rowdiness of the world.

From known records when a person hides and spends time in this tree, after awhile he will be moved out of that troubling community to a better place. 

After awhile of spending my time under this tree, I was also moved from this community to another place that promises a better life. 

This migration was what everybody seeked after in this community and only a few ever gets it. 

On my moving out of this community my siblings and mum celebrated with me before I finally departed them to the new place.

title: The sons of God
description:
On 7 November 2020, I saw myself in a dream in a time where we've gained our true perfection as the sons of God. We were like a different class of beings.

Their were crazy technologies within our reach. For example, a device that could translate you to another place in case you're in distress. Soldiers were under our command according to our rankings.

Ordinary people were afraid of us, they won't dare to touch us. We receive our commands directly from the King Jesus, and we all had ranks. 

Our assignments and authority was well calibrated by our ranks. You also could work under or with another son of God based on your relationship with Jesus on the first world. 

We were also given the task of collecting tributes and taxes for King Jesus. We also took enumerations that were due for King Jesus. 

The sons of God wear white robs with little variations. We also periodically receive briefings from the Lord Jesus, and there was this huge respect you just find yourself having for him. Like you could find yourself face flat on the floor when he comes to you. His palace or throne room has fires constantly burning. And their were no sun in the sky.

In this dream, the closest way to illustrate our operations as the sons of God was the way David's mighty men were to him. Each son of God has a record or reputation about them like David's mighty men had. 

We were the ones ruling and reigning on the earth as sons of God, but there were also another sect of people and nations around us who weren't sons of God; they were just people, but they were many all round the world.

(The sons of God are not killers but enforcers of the authority they carry in Christ all round the world. This would be their next assignment and that authority and responsibilities associated with it comes according to your relationship with Jesus on earth and how well you executed your first assignment.) 

Daniel chapter 7

title: Working With the Father
description:
On 3 January 2021, I saw Dr. Myles in my dream, he partnered with me and we started engaging on a project together which resulted in a massive success for us.

We actually share a bed space together and were so cooperative with each other.
People were astonished of our result and we were trying to explain to everyone how we planned our nights well not dosing off all the way. We were so strategic on how we implemented our plan. John 6:45

title: The Unexpected Job
description:
On 23 April 2021, In my dream I did something I wasn't supposed to do with a man's file. This man seamed to be quazi, quite rich and unusually mysterious.

After sometimes of me trying to hide from him and I couldn't, I decided to come in straight with him and ready to take whatever consequences that was mine.

While Mr. Quazi and I were discussing about me and mine intended means of repaying his debt he decided to hire me for his software company.

Mr. Quazi while discussing with me revealed some of his secret to me concerning his wealth, The Holy Spirit. I was a little surprised about his knowledge of him.

The whole idea of this dream was that, I obtained a job by favor to an foreign employer who initially wanted to punish me.

While on this dream and on a table with Quazi, I saw a man carrying two bags of money to the forest intending to share it with a woman that had accompanied her. I heard someone called this man a ritualist and I saw clearly why he was rich.

title: Prosecuting The Silas Dellima On May 19, 2021 - Dream Encounter and Cursing
description: On 19 May 2021, In my dream I saw Silas and a member of his group speaking to my community youths (thankgod, etc). He was demanding things from them in return for their peace. Immediately I started coming they all ran into the bush. The youths reported all these to me. And so I cursed and sentenced him along with his members to death as I woke up.

title: Glory Snapshots
description:
On 6 June 2021, I saw in a dream where glory is now living with us because we're married. I was coaching and correcting her including my family on people to stop listening to and those to listen to.

Later I saw in the spirit as we were communicating via video calls.

title: The Upcoming Scholarship
description: On 5 June 2021, I saw in a dream where I was enrolled in a scholarship. And within this dream, I knew that this was for master degree and I also was reminded of Goodwin's prophetic word concerning my education. Next I saw me getting ready for an examination.

title: Pushing away Grandpa Burial
description: On 5 June 2021, I saw our house in a Ahoada redecorated for burial. Their were people from my community. I was upset, but not over the death, but for the noise people were making me which limited my interactions and in prayers. Chisa was majorly involved in the rewiring of the to support for musical instruments. None of us felt sad, my mum neither did. Who died in that dream was unclear to me but my suspicions it seems like my grandpa.

title: The Purchase By The Blood
description: On 2 June 2021, After asking for mercy and Deliverance from the Lord for my family and I, I saw while praying a bank teller and a hand print of blood on it. As I ponder on this vision it became clear to me that this is the receipt to my purchase by the blood of Jesus. I was sold by my ancestors into demonic slavery, but the Lord Jesus bought me back and the receipt has the hand print of his blood. This means freedom to me against every demonic covenant made in my bloodline. Gal 3:13-14, 1 Cor 6:20, Ish 43:1, Jer 31:11, Ish 52:11.

title: Inside The Battle (Gatekeeper)
description: On 1 June 2021, After strongly praying in the spirit against marine spirits and cutting of everything called relationship or covenant between us I received a feedback from a dream. In my vision I saw a huge fight burst open between two women over one man. The fight was so intense that no people could separate them. After this scene, I saw another group of people having a fight against a damsel and they were wining. When I came into the scene they told me that they were fighting against the gatekeeper. The gatekeeper came against me and I could easily fight against her because I was stronger, but something else happened. Even though I knew that this woman is so evil, their was this weak part of me that wanted to have sex with her because of a strong attraction. The dream ended with me struggling to reset her sexual appeal and that weak part of me gave in and I had a contact with her even without us undressing it resulted in a physical release of Siemens on my side. But I got some intelligence from this dream on how to defeat her by defeating that part of me that have been yielding to her. And now I also know that she is a gatekeeper.

title: Journey Update By Abadi
description:
On 1 June 2021, In my dream I had decided to emback on a journey as a child of God. The journey guard was abadi as he briefed me on the Do's and don'ts.

He told me the journey is sacrificial starting from the beginnings to the end, and it demands of you to give up your most interesting belongings.
And it also has to do with resisting the deals presented by the gods/spirits/demons/Satan  and staying till the end. I saw that many had fell in this road because of the challenging times they along their journey.

title: The Parallel Life of Kante
description: On 30 May 2021, In my dream I was watching a TV showing the documentation of N'golo Kante goals scored against different clubs and countries.

title: Visited By Apostle Michael Orakpo
description: On 28 May 2021, I saw Apostle Michael Orakpo laying hands me and releasing graces. During a service in our church, Orokpo walked in dressed in a suit with briefcase and sat next to me. I was so excited and I quickly engaged him in some short conversation. I asked him to lay his hands on me. After I left my seat to quickly assist the ushers take the offerings, I then sat on the seat just in front of him, but Orokpo was now praying with his head bowed. As i faced the pulpit he placed his two hands on the back of my head and just passionately prayed in the spirit for me. After the prayer, he left the service so swiftly and I didn't see him again.

title: Sowing To Pst Chris
description: On 25 May 2021, I saw pastor Chris Oyakilome in my dream and I packaged some money and sowed to him. I remember spending time with him in the fields, he didn't talk much, I did all the talking while he enthusiastically gave me all his attention. I was very excited speaking with him as he listened. After I woke up, I received an understanding that I had been with the Father.

title: The Territorial Forces
description: On 8 December 2020, I saw in my dream a territorial spirit (with a full thick black cloak/hood) and the hoard of devils under his command dispatched to war, and they were shooting & killing everyone on their path, as I observed. Next I saw them look for me with full force as I escaped their clutches. Then I woke up and lambasted in the spirit for 3hr straight, with the lord giving me more updates on my havoc to them.

title: Double Dating Warning
description: On 5 May 2021, I had a warning dream were I asked another girl out and immediately she agreed. I saw that I had made a huge mistake because I already have glory as my date. It became quite difficult to approach this lady with the bad news because it feels stupid and childish breaking up with her just after agreeing with her. Of course, I canceled this dream immediately I woke up.

title: Quazi & Job Again
description: On 28 April 2021, In my dream, me and quazi had interactions that led to him spending sometime with me in my living place. We talked about programming and we took a look at a site that keeps on posting job opportunities. I saw even one with a terrible ideology wanting to have a dealing with me, but I rejected them with lightening speed.

title: The Plan for Canada
description: On 25 April 2021, In my dream I saw me deliberating on traveling abroad, but their wasn't a clear cut plan. When I asked for a form, and was thinking about how my mum will also come there whenever she pleases, I was given an immigrant worker form in this dream. I saw clearly that my mind is the only thing limiting me. And I was totally responsible for wherever height I wanted to attain in life. I saw that why I was thinking the way I was is because of configurations I had gotten from the culture and people around me. I also saw that I had about 425,000 in my account.

title: Goodbye Demonic Creatures
description:
On 19 April 2021, I saw a group of oversized pigs, some dogs, and some huge and over-matured lizards leaving our compound and they went into the river (unoshi gida) at odiereke and moved to ikod direction against the current. These animals were heavy and plenty, it was like a migration. I had this dream after the Lord inspired me to engage in just two warfare prayers with my mum and sister.

Pray that every dark and demonic veil covering us from receiving the good light of God's blessings be turn down right. Use a specific word of God which is a sword to do the tearing.

title: The Last Battle
description: On 11 April 2021, In my dream, I've made it to the finals and my last opponent is Batista the WWE wrestler. This guy is huge and didn't seem to have a weak spot. He has brutally defeated all his previous opponents and it was my turn to defeat him for my good. I absolutely knew it will take the hand of God for me to defeat him, because humanly speaking there is no way I can defeat him, but with my God I can easily defeat him.

title: Dream Encounter with Umez and Peter's Rivalry Continues
description:
On April 2, 2021, I saw Umez again in my dream alongside Peter. He and I had conversations in my grandfather's house which is in my community; he harassed families and meddled with things not his problem.

Peter's rivalry continues even in my dreams since I've left Nworieubi. Ina Chisa wasn't that happy with me, she kept frowning her face towards me. And I also saw Frederick who didn't seem like a friend.

title: Dream Encounter with Young People - Strong Disapproval and Departure
description: On March 29, 2021, in my dream I met a group of young people whom I thought we could do something together. Soon I noticed that they were permitting their friends to fornicate in front of us; two young females were giving an oral sex act to someone else while others looked on with no shame but it was outrageous for me and so I left them angrily, parking my properties out because this is the wrong people. Before whenever I had such dreams I'd be enticed into participating however now there zero inclination as I've changed how i see those boys/girls they are almost an enemy to me.

title: Love Motivated By Choice
description:
On 28 March 2021, in my dream I saw Glory in Nworieubi and I was ready go talk with her. But I had to complete a small task for my aunt before meeting her.

I found out that my love for her isn't motivated by feelings rather it's by choice. I've chosen and decided to love her.

title: The Ark of Favor
description:
On 17 December 2020, I was totally married by favor to a second daughter of a man, but I didn't want to touch my wife because I haven't built a house to bring her in. Still thinking about that I heard an audible voice within and around me saying "He that finds a wife finds a good thing and obtains favor from the Lord" Prov 18:22

This voice was saying to me that by marrying this woman I've obtained favor from the lord, because I was cooking up ideas to send her back if I can't provide for her. But by being with her side by side I saw us in a story building, like it was newly built.

Don't allow circumstances to steal away the gift of God from you.

title: The Strong Anointing
description: On 21 December 2020, in my dream I had a strong and strange anointing that can control the physics of people. I was using it to restore law and order and people were literally astonished about the force of this power each time its on display. It makes one look like a god on the earth but its the power of God entrusted to me.

title: Visitation By Chris Oyakilome
description:
On 15 March 2021, In my dream, I was hosting pastor Chris Oyakilome in our house, in the morning he went to my compound and sprinkled some water for sweeping. I went close to him and took over the water sprinkling and I was removing the dead leaves on the floor, he asked me if we had a toilet, I said nothing as good compared to the one you have in your home, he smiled. I took the opportunity to ask him if he ever served Benson Idahosa, he said no. I asked what about the picture I saw you in a white long sleeve playing piano. He just smiled and went away with the "I don't have this time, I've to go kind of smiles". Even though I was still calling him to answer he just went away probably to the toilet but that was how I woke up.

What intrigues me is how he related with me like he knew what I was going to say and how I was going to say it. Like he knew me better than I knew myself.

title: The Warning About Mummy Helen
description: On 28 February 2021, In my dream I was in a position where I was receiving thrash from people and burning them. People from various places will bring their thrash to me and I will place them at the spot where I burnt them down. These thrash range from old electronics, damaged carpets, old cupboard, etc. One of the people that brought their thrash to me was mummy Helen. People (including mummy Oluchi and others) warned me to be careful of her and wanted me to have no side business with her so she will not get me mingled into doing something else such as fornicating with her. This is because in this dream she was married and aged at 28years. Funny enough she came with a strategy of mingling with me when she brought her thrash but I gave her no attention of such kind. I carefully burnt her thrash and refused to have any other dealings with her. This is what the Holy Spirit says about the meaning of thrash. 'People's negative heart crushing and unwise words can be regarded as thrash.'

title: Sowing PC to Mama Burger
description: On 5 March 2021, In my dream I saw me sowed my PC to mama burger of county and she said as she blessed me "the Holy Spirit wants me to pray for you." and she prayed and blessed me before she left. Sowing that PC was like letting go of something I had emotional attachment for. But I had to let it go because I was led by the Spirit to do so.

title: Explaining Salvation Stockcy
description: On 5 March 2021, In my dream I was watching Kevin Zadai preach then stockcy came and took me aside. The walk was getting longer and I was tired of the way he was holding me so I resisted him and quickly got out of his hands then he explained why he was taking me like that. He told me that it was because he wanted someone who will explain to him why he needed to be saved. Seeing his honesty, I willed myself to go with him to the house so I could explain to him.

title: Apst. Arome Osayi Visitation
description:
On 25 February 2021, I saw In my dream Apostle Arome Osayi visited me and we spoke with each other, I told him how powerful his message were.

I also started hearing the song he sang in my spirit, "He who dwells in the midst of the cherubims..."
A little time after our discussion, I saw a large congregation in a church called Arema bible church, institute, or college. 
Within this congregation were apostles seated, including Apst. Michael Orakpo, a wonderful choir, and a mixed congregation both foreign and local. I saw that this church went as far as Japan.

title: Almost Deceived Glory
description: On 28 October 2020, in my dream I saw that glory was going to a witch doctor in order to get dark powers. She has been lied to by the devil that the only way for her condition to improve is by diabolical means. Meanwhile, Mummy Oluchi was there as well looking exhausted of getting an Emphatic No from glory. My objection and encouragement for glory to follow God calmed her from proceeding to the final stage which was to cut and mark the body with razor blade.

title: The Lord's Stern Warning
description:
On 19 January 2021, a day after my spiritual birthday, In a dream I saw the lord Jesus visit me personally. I did something detrimental in my life and I was suffering from the consequences.

I even went to mummy Oluchi for help but she couldn't help me, although she saw that I fell from grace.

Though I couldn't just point out my problem until the Lord Jesus appeared to me in my dream, he was wearing his normal white robe outfit. He told me that I've trusted a woman more than I've trusted him. 

He also showed me that it became the reason why I stopped seeking after souls and the kingdom and I didn't know it.

The Lord Jesus pursued me all round the world until he got me. My whole life was shattered, yet, I couldn't pinpoint what I did wrong. 

The equivalent of the warning he gave me in this dream could only be compared to the warning he gave peter in John 21:14-17.

After the stern warning he delivered me from my misery, this caused me to come back to my senses. It was like a spell was removed from me. 

Afterwards Jesus went with me everywhere I go, he showed himself in the street and alley, anyone with eyes could see him walking with me, Jesus restored me.

When I brought him to mummy Oluchi's office, there was this atmosphere that came with me, she could sense him and asked me, "what did you come here with? I can feel it in the spirit realm" before I showed her that it was Jesus. 

The dream ended with Jesus seating on a chair in the office and me laying flat on floor worshipping Jesus while mummy Oluchi was eating at his feet.

On waking up, the Holy Spirit gave me a clean interpretation of the whole dream saying, "If you trust a woman more than you trust me (the word of God), you're going to lose everything". 

Immediately, the Lord reminded me of Adam's choice to willfully obey his wife and disobey his word. Gen chapter 3.

title: Telling Mummy Oluchi
description: On 11 February 2021, Mummy Oluchi visited me in my dream and looking towards my window not knowing what she was seeing in the Spirit, looking worried she told me that "you need to be in a relationship." I went over to her and hugged her and told her to seat so I could tell her what the Lord has been telling concerning my relationship with Glory in other to fill her in with plan the Lord had given me.

title: Wedding on The Horizon
description: On 10 February 2021, In my dream, my wedding day drew closer, many people visited me from far and near. I suddenly was faced with a challenge, everyone was missing me already. My siblings were crying, I couldn't find my mum around. Even our relatives where consoling me to be strong, and I also was emotionally touched. Glory saw the number of people that have come to strengthen me or to say a kind word to me and she went soft as well thinking of canceling or pausing the wedding, so I called her closer and told her that we're doing this. A lot of people were missing me already, people I don't even talk with on a normal day. People came all way from Nworieubi in IMO state to Ahoada. Mummy Helen and family, mummy Oluchi and all the members of the church. People from Port Harcourt and other places. To my family, it feels like they were losing me. A hall was being made ready, probably the wedding hall.

title: Ospack Operation in Dream
description: On 6 February 2021, in my dream a Personnal of Ospack told me how they operate because I was helping some young people from becoming a victim of Ospack. I saw that they intend on moving their office or agents closer to the road where people do businesses. I saw that I was like an obstacle to their day-to-day operation because of my interventions and they couldn't stop me even if I'm in their midst. They stay in front of shops or public places and invoke their charms on young people passing by to influence them into committing crime so that they profit from it. I saw Umez involved in giving out jobs, his father was full of greed often shutting off people from giving him money. I saw Godwin giving me a scholarship/job opportunity, but I insisted on waiting for the job the Lord had promised me.

title: Meeting with Sir Niza in a Dream
description:
On 11 January 2021, the Lord showed me in a dream that I'll meeting with Sir Niza. In that dream Sir Niza was encouraging me because I felt tired with a lot of things in my life.

He told me that I was his prophet but I wasn't really interested in all those as of that time, because the Lord Jesus had already told me that I have an apostolic calling and I was just stressed out of recent. However, on thinking back, it occurred to me that apostles function as prophets too, and I was already told of this by Mr. Godwin. He also sent me a text stating something about Jacinta, I was confusing it for glory's role before I woke up.

I now understand how the Lord speaks to us via thoughts, its like having someone send a text message to you and you have a glance at it in your notification bar.

title: The Visit to Nworieubi
description: On 3 February 2020, I saw me visit Nworieubi again this time, I saw glory, we had great time spent together, we discoursed quite a lot concerning ourselves and the future. Zion came straightening things with me.

title: The Arrival Confirmation
description: On 1 February 2021, my mum had a dream about me stating. In that dream you arrived successfully to Canada, but you weren't calling frequently.

title: What The Lord Is Doing On Earth Today, Part II - Jesus Visiting His People and Preparing Them for What's to Come
description: On 26 January 2021, In my dream, Jesus was visiting his people all over the world building, training, and preparing them for what's to come. He wants all to come into unity of faith and take back everything the devil stole from them. He is preparing those who don't think of themselves as somebody, not the know it all nor the have it all. In this group there are quite a lot of young children, single parents, and dedicated youths. I also saw that part of his plans is for us to have small gatherings in our homes where believers meet up. These small gatherings were where the Lord Jesus appeared and taught them the way to do things here on Earth. From what I saw if you're going to be a part of this group Jesus is raising himself then you must not have any other agenda than God's kingdom, your love for him should not compete with money or anything else; You need to become someone who dwells in secret as he will visit there too. He was sad about the suffering his people are experiencing at hands of evil and strongly associated that lack understanding.

title: Hosting Jesus in David Ibiyeomie's Journey
description:
On 25 January 2021, I saw me hosting David Ibiyeomie in my little room. I prepared him a wonderful dish and he just responded by doing the same while he engaged me in a discursion. This went on for about three times before he took me to his father's company, David Oyedepo. His father on his white suit gladly welcomed him and gave orders for him to be fully given access to everything he owned.

He was first registered by the workers in the company using a computer configured with a Python CMD Shell to do the registration. We met another woman who also understood how to host David Ibiyeomie, he gave me good comments about the deeds of that woman. When I woke up I knew that it was Jesus I was hosting, his father Oyedepo was a typeset of God the Father and the company was God's kingdom with the workers being the angels.

title: Murdock Invitee - Dream and Impartation Experience
description: On 9 January 2021, in my dream Mike Murdock called me for his mother-in-law's burial at Ihuechi. I was getting ready to go with a suit while also receiving impartation from him. In the same dream, he married Patricia (his daughter) who is young. After waking up and seeking guidance through Dr. Murdock’s video titled 'The Day That Changed My Financial Life', an impactful word led me into helping others on online platforms for issues they were facing which I found overwhelming in number. People expressed that God brought this help to them, even assisting my neighbors' children with complex drawing assignments.

title: Conversations with A Canadian
description: On 29 April 2020, in my dream I had a short discussion with a Canadian. We talked about the geographical location of Edmonton or Edinburgh, a city in Alberta, Canada. We had a pretty descent communication.

title: Top Head Not Bottom Tail On 2 January I Saw How God Has Blessed Me in So Much That Wherever and Whatever I Find Myself Doing I Was Prospering.
description: On 2 January 2021, In my dream I saw how God has blessed me in so much that wherever and whatever I find myself doing I was prospering. I could do incredible things like edit people's body parts with my coding, Sing in the choir perfectly with no prior experience, and their was a growing number of young people attracted to me. These abilities caused me to make a lot of money with ease.

title: Deeper Concepts
description: On 6 January 2021, I saw Sir Niza and I digging into deeper concept of things by searching everything searchable using our computers, he was patient with me, my computer and ability to type and search was slower than his.

title: The Glory Choice
description: On 6 January 2021, In my dream I was ready to meet glory after a period of her travel and when she came back from her journey. I seek for a moment to speak with her then the scene changed to another girl that was having difficulties deciding who to pick between I and a guy who used to be my friend until things changed. I asked her this question "don't you care that I love you?" She paused and didn't say a thing before I woke up.

title: The IELTS Exam
description: On 31 December 2020, I saw me and a girl taking an exam, I had a good record and the examiner was expecting me to pass very well. Only me and this girl sat for this exam with some of my supervisors and other scenes looking international.

title: Snake Encounter in Dream
description: On 3 January 2021, I saw in my dream that the reason why a snake we saw crossed over from the kitchen roof to the house roof was because my mum didn't listen to me. She acted out emotionally which gave the snake the time to cross over and escaped. She had a machete on her hand yet she tried to catch the snake with her hands by holding the tail. Eventually, the snake climbed the kitchen roof and to escape by jumping to the house roof. Out of my frustration mum threw away the machete instead of giving it to me so can kill that serpent. I hated the whole idea to let a snake run away, and out of that anger I exclaimed "mum never listens to me"! . I'm also being told to clean up our environment.

title: Disconnected Zion - On 28 December 2020, I saw me in the spirit being present in Zion's room...
description:
I took his phone by his bed which has a white bedsheet covering it and was on the floor. I saw that the phone has been put on an airplane mode.

I dialed my number in his phone to see if its going through but its no longer online. I kept it back and went away. 

This happened after praying in the Spirit for long. I felt like I was on a mission and needed to do whatever I was there for fast and get away.

title: The Unserved Ties
description: On 27 December 2020, I saw Bro Emmanuel and wife sitting on a bench opposite to Glory and Zion's with Zion just finished plating glory's hair. They were all discussing an issue of someone else's tragic relationship before I walked in. And I just came out from the inside of a room with some disappointment on my face seeing the situation that glory hadn't cut off ties with Zion as she should.

title: Daddy Adeboye Blessing
description: On 30 May 2020, In my dream I served at the table where great men of God came for a meeting and I received a blessing from daddy Adeboye. He also held my head and wrote something on a paper to me. Many people looked at me with surprise like I've just been given heaven and earth.

title: The Man on a Mission
description:
On 28 October 2020, In my dream I went to a community named Ikodu. I went through that community collecting tech parts for my invention.

I met folks from my high school days and also came across some enemy gangs who couldn't do a thing about me. It was as if I was invading their territory and they didn't want me around.

I bought the rare parts I needed from the vendors which included a teenager selling Akara, and a kid who assembles tech parts he gathers from his search.

I also bought a high quality sneaker at a favorable price of #3,800 before jugging out of that community completing my mission.

title: Banners of Desecration
description:
On 23 December 2020, I saw in my dream someone in form of Nnemaka hung a pornographic banner inside the church. These banners were his business banners for selling pornographic videos.

At first I thought why should that pornographic banner be hanging inside the house of God?

This image is also a trap to the people of God who had troubles in the past on pornography.

Again, it was also desecrating the altar of God and bringing shame to his name. Nobody in the church thought it was a serious thing but the lord told me in the dream to tell mummy Oluchi that those banners must be pulled down fast.

title: IELTS On The Horizon
description: On 19 December 2020, I saw me preparing for IELTS exam, it seems as real as the real thing.

title: Played Very Well in Dream Soccer Game
description:
On 13 December 2020, in my dream I was a part of a soccer team and played very well for them. When I woke up, my body felt like I had engaged in a soccer game.

During the Shiloh 2020 Sunday thanksgiving service, I heard the bishop mentioned that your legs could hurt when you've finished playing a successful soccer game. It means that you played very well, he said.

With his statement, I got the understanding to the meaning of my dream and why I felt like that.

title: No Devils Allowed
description: On 8 December 2020, I saw in my dream Hazel Grace Esther brought a man into her parent's house and this man was trying to lay down on my bed, but I kept on pushing him away that he hated me for not allowing me to lie down on my bed. In my mind, I was thinking who is this random stranger that wants me to drive off his space before he understands the phrase 'No, get away'.

title: Spiritual Pro
description: On 18 November 2020, In my dream I was fierce against the enemy. It was easy to spot a demonic crusade like the way one can identity his right from his left. God's angels love working with me because they feel its easy. I was really spiritually sensitive.

title: Ikaws We Meet
description: On 9 December 2020, I and Ikaws got back together as friends. In fact we cooked again like we used to in college.

title: Glory Symphony
description: On 8 December 2020, in my dream glory and I united in a deep connection she was all filled with joy to see me again. We came to a resolute concerning all the misunderstanding we've had of recent. People around could sense that we had a connection. On closing up we sang a song together.

title: Emotional Trauma
description: On 23 August 2020, In my dream, I traveled out to somewhere, on my return to Nworieubi hurrying to get to church and to see glory, she was in a total different mood now. She doesn't want to give me her attention because I left her for a while. It seems to me that people have left her behind in the past and that has created pains in her emotions. I also saw courage in the dream.

title: The Uncloaked Devourer
description: On 6 December 2020, In my dream I saw frank got into another trouble with some group of boys. My mum just had access to huge sum of money. Frank was on the door with this group of boys wanting a seat down for monetary settlements. It looked like Frank owed this people.

title: New Cyber Fraudster Alert
description:
On 1 November 2020, In my dream I was called by someone in the person of pst john. He was trying to buy me into his plan of buying data plan from an unknown vendor called tencent.

The problem is that their means for acquiring and distributing data is not clear and looked insidious to me.

So I began probing him and he throw two scriptures to convince me, but the scriptures are not contextual to what he was telling me. One from Jeremiah and another from John. I was not going to buy from him because my spirit is not even agreeing with his proposal, just then I woke up.

title: Future Calling Now
description:
On 3 July 2020, I saw a man who flew in from Canada. He was pressed and wanted to use the bathroom.

All the bathrooms around where messed up.
It turns out that he keep asking me about my works yet to be completed for other people I'm working for.
And when I woke up, I'm the one being pressed for the use of a bathroom.

title: David Ibeyomie gave me a word of knowledge that there have been difficulties in my life.
description: He told me to take the communion with understanding, take soul wining and coding seriously, that my breakthrough lies there.

title: Meeting Niza & Samuel
description: On 20 November 2020, In my dream I saw Niza and Samuel in their house. They were happy to see me and was ready for a walk.

title: The Rich Family
description: On 17 November 2020, In my dream I visited a rich large family and I noticed a difference in my character that astonished me. I was talking with less speed, boldness and clarity. My speeches are even more presentable and more conversational  than before. I thought to myself in the dream that God noticed all these upgrade and never told me about them.

title: The Salvation - Sin of Murder in Dream and Rescue by Oluchi
description:
On 16 November 2020, in my dream I committed the sin of murder. A sin I consider as terrible. What did I do about this sin? For a start I was immediately sorted out for by angry people who wanted to have the perpetrator pay with his life.

In the dream, I felt like I had had this dream before and that I was just merely repeating the scenes.

In the dream, I ran straight to mummy Oluchi and confessed my sins to her. Honestly, I had committed murder unknowingly and strangers were looking for me.
Mummy Oluchi is actually a woman of God, and I also consider her as a mother in the Lord.
She wasted no time and undertook a journey with me to rescue me from imminent dangers that lay outside for me.

She helped and instructed me on what to do all the way until it was clear that my enemies could not find any evidence against me.

title: Cassava Processing Line at Garry processing company
description: On 15 November 2020, I saw a process like for Garry processing company. Cassava tubes are being loaded into containers like a deep freezer. Then they move orderly into the grinding process. Each cassava within containers is taken and grinded into their respective boxes before moving to the next phase. This business was managed by two brothers.

title: The Woman with my Form
description:
On 6 November 2020, In my dream I saw a woman who gave me a prepared form filled in with my information including my passport attached to it. Then she stretched it over to me and asked me to thumbprint and I did.

I've asked the lord to cancel this if it isn't his will for me. And I've a feeling that it has to do with my next work.

title: The Losing Contender
description: On 6 November 2020, in my dream I saw so many scenes and one of them was a dead neighbor who was a policeman contending with my family like on a dialog. The Holy Spirit gave me the understanding that the devil is contending against our freedom. The dead policeman indicated a demonic force against me who felt like he had legal grounds to withhold us. Its obvious that he is losing the battle already and I've reported him again to the courts of heaven. Furthermore, the Holy Spirit highlighted some scriptures that validates the interpretation. The Passion Translation Mark 5:2 As Jesus stepped ashore, a demon-possessed madman came out of the graveyard and confronted him. The Passion Translation Jude 1:9 Even the archangel Michael, when he was disputing with the devil over the body of Moses, dared not insult or slander him, but simply said, “The Lord Yahweh rebuke you!” New Living Translation Zechariah 3:1-2 Then the angel showed me Jeshua the high priest standing before the angel of the Lord. The Accuser, Satan, was there at the angel’s right hand, making accusations against Jeshua. And the Lord said to Satan, “I, the Lord, reject your accusations, Satan. Yes, the Lord who has chosen Jerusalem rebukes you. This man is like a burning stick that has been snatched from the fire.” From these passages, the Holy Spirit revealed to me that it takes a greater authority to overcome the disputes, contentions, and confrontations of Satan as seen from the encounters above. And the greater authority has been given to me because of my union with Jesus.

title: The Contention For Her
description:
On 14 November 2020, In my dream I saw Esther and his brother Emmanuel. Esther and I had closure in the past. But at this moment, she needed a place to pass the night.

His brother Emmanuel never wanted us to be close and hated the idea that we could go into a relationship. His reason being that she is too good for me or I don't deserve her.

I next saw me covering Esther's body with my NYSC jacket on a second bed to prevent her from getting cold.

And this treatment was making him mad, and at the same time making her happy not minding the protests from his brother. 

I later saw a picture of us hugging each other before the closing of the dream.

title: Shame For Fame
description: On 2 November 2020, I saw Logic Z in my dreams, he finally began to make it in the music industry but it was on the devils side. I was just starting out the release of my songs and I wasn't seeking to be known at all. In fact I was thinking of masking my face with a Nigerian flag paint.

title: The Aging Ronaldo
description: On 5 May 2020, I had a dream about Ronaldo, he was getting tired because of his age, and needed someone to help him on the front line. Then Higuin showed up and disided to help him. He will also be changing his hairstyles, because he can't keep up with that as well.

title: Thieves Alert
