description: On 1 November 2020, I saw bundu and his in my dream unlawfully watching traps that doesn't belong to them. Taking the catch they find, and this is stealing.

title: Hunger for Dark Powers
description:
On 28 October 2020, In my dream, I saw a lot pertaining to how humans are willfully leasing themselves to work with the demonic all for the taste for dark powers. These people who uses demonic powers are deceiving people in the world with their signs and wonders. And these people who are being deceived thought they were in a church.

What they do is to do things that will please their spirit guides. Then these demons will promise to help them in the public. The partnership between this human vessels and the demons helps them to manipulate things. This includes changing of the sizes of objects, playing with fire without suffering burns.
I saw demonic hands having weird fingers with a mouth in the middle of the palm. I saw men with black masks on their faces. I saw people who behave like demons themselves. Their dressing is unlike anything I've seen, except it looked devilish. I also saws holes and soils that looked like the land of the dead.

All what these people had in common was the lust for power, and their willingness to go sell their souls to the devil for it. And all of this people are on the business of deceiving and misleading people masquerading as churches. And all these while I was an observer as I felt like someone was showing me these things.

title: Imposter AJS in a Dream
description:
In a dream, I saw myself in the midst of an imposter AJS and a woman assisting him. By my side was my mother, who has brought me here to seek out a prophetic word.

My mum was demanded a certain amount of money to buy a bottled substance which was to be used on me. 
I was placed in a bath tub with water and this sedative substance was introduced in my mouth. Immediately, I felt dizzy and numb. 
AJS started asking me questions like a hypnotist walking someone through their mind and interpreting some false information to mum. Shortly after, I came to full consciousness and I could tell that something was wrong about this AJS. I knew that he wasn't supposed to take money from us, nor needing me be in a bath tub with a sedative substance in me. 
I told him about my disposition against his approach, but he gave me some unrecallable reason. Either way, his attitude was bad, almost like he was angry at me.

When I woke up from the dream, it was obvious to me that I've met an imposter in my dream.

title: The Gift of Faith
description: On 28 June 2020, I saw in my dream I was praying for people, using the gift of faith to levitate them from their feet. I did this to prove to them about the power of God, yet people were so blinded. It took the grace of God to get a few people to actually see what God is doing.

title: Zion Movie Making
description: On 23 June 2020, In my dream I saw Zion acting movies and short films which are placed on YouTube. He was also educating viewers on making movies, the principles and the laws that guides movie making.

title: Journey with the Driver
description: On 16 June 2020, I got into a bus that bypassed the massive city wide traffic jam. Our driver was smart and vigilant as he navigated us through the heavy traffic of the city, which would have cost us a lot of time.

title: Words of Knowledge on Attack
description: On 16 June 2020, among the many gifting of the Holy Spirit, I saw that he hated the words of knowledge the most, so he stirred up the world leaders to revolt against the bearers of this gifts.

title: Dr. Myles Munroe dissecting the word to a woman and also telling her why he must die after completing his mission.
description: On 13 June, 2020 I saw in my dream Dr. Myles Munroe dissecting the word to a woman and also telling her why he must die after completing his mission.

title: Sir Niza in my dream.
description: On 13 June, 2020 I saw sir Niza in my dream. We had an expensive unleavened bread for communion. Afterwards we came back from a journey. He also has more disciples now of different development stage. I took excuse from him before leaving.

title: Dove Tattoo
description: On 4 June 2020, I had a dream where prince my brother also friend came to me with a Holy Spirit tattoo on his chest. I decided to have a tattoo of dove with a plant in its mouth, bursting out of the wind on my left lap.

title: Dead Now Alive
description: On 28 May 2020, I had a dream where Alex my sibling was raised back to life from the dead.

title: Persecution For The Church
description: On 18 May 2020, In my dream, I saw since the time of Jesus the kingdom of darkness has always tried to stop the spread of the Gospel. I saw persecutions of Christians, and the resilient faith that this persecution produced in the body of Christ. I saw how evangelism became dangerous, diabolic people and murderers were everywhere. Even Christians were betraying themselves because of the fear being killed. But Jesus was aware of all these incidents and persecution revealed who his true sheep were. As this persecution happened there was a great reaction from the church to evangelize more; fear of death was gone from the church. People were going out for Evangelism knowing that they could lose their lives.

title: The Ministry of Angels - Dream on May 11, 2020
description: I saw that why we face difficulty obtaining things in life is because we are driven by the flesh. When we're driven by what has been written in our books, the angels go ahead and cause those things to happen.

title: Returning The Lock
description: On 10 May 2020, I had a dream, I saw a devil impersonating my mum in our compound at Odiereke. I rushed in and throw a black nylon declaring it as the blood of Jesus. Before I got there she was gone. I saw a key and a padlock left behind. Then I declared that my compound be surrounded by a wall of fire.

title: I Can't Fail
description: On 8 May 2020, in my dream, I was observing how a captain learnt to condition his mind to believe that he can't fail. Repeatedly, when faced challenges, his mind received the solution to outwit the problem. His friends believed in him because of this trait. He was a leader in the military.

title: The Promiscuous Woman
description:
On 5 May 2020, I saw a promiscuous woman who left her well-respected lecturing husband for young lovers.

She nagged and embarrassed him until she got what she wanted, a divorce. 
Next she started sharing her assets with these gold digging young men because they were all about the money.

title: The Ministry of Integrity Probed My Mother for Something Like a Crime
description: On 2 May 2020, I saw some group of agents from the ministry of integrity came to probe my mother for something like a crime. They were examining my Mum's phone and checking its functionalities. I remembered what God has already told me about my family, and it didn't include my mum convicted of any crime so I held on to that. Victor had a word for me about lumen app, but his mum wouldn't just let him deliver the message in full, so I told him to write it down so I could get it from him when he's back from school. Samuel was around and I had a word that touched him. I told him that, in your time of adversity you hold on to what God had already told you concerning you.

title: Perry Stone in my dream influencing me.
description: On 2 May 2020, I saw Perry stone in my dream, he was following me around, influencing me to make good decisions by just being around me. I saw my phone playing his videos on YouTube, he was also playful to me.

title: New Governmental Position in Dream
description: On 1 May 2020, In my dream, I was recognized and given a new position in front of a large crowd by commissioner Umez. It was because of my contributions in writing positive things that have helped people and his government. This shocked everyone and shut the mouths of my critics.

title: Explaining Computer
description: On 29 April 2020, In my dream, I was explaining a lot of computer terms to people. Until they were calling me, the machine.

title: Heads up on Testifiers
description: On 29 April 2020, I had a dream where my schedule officer sent me a letter informing me that my app built with lumen came top in the competition and it was taken. That she will be coming to see me by Sunday or Monday latest.

title: Scholarship & Lagos Journey
description: On 29 April 2020, I saw me getting a scholarship. And a journey where I found myself in Lagos.

title: Dragon Fight: O.I.S
description:
On 29 April 2020, I saw a dream where a huge 2d animated blue dragon fought against other 2d black dragons. They were like an avatar for game players.

The players determines how effective their dragons can be by their commands and will power. Even at this, there were many black dragons, but one huge powerful blue dragon. This I understood after the blue dragon poured out fire that consumed one of the black dragons. And the blue dragon said to me if you had specified a broader parameter, I could have destroyed them all at once, ending the whole war.

title: Heads up on Rejoice
description: On 29 April 2020, I saw in a dream where I fell in love with rejoice and we kissed. I know what the lord had said to me, I'm not falling for that.

title: Healing Solution
description: On 27 April 2020, I saw me making a baby food solution that helps improve the healing of infirmities.

title: Historic Warning on Women
description:
On 25 April 2020, I met my grandpa, and he told me a secret. He proved to me that he had a call.

He showed me books and materials that he was supposed to study, but he sacrificed it all to marry a woman that wasn't right for him.

Next, I saw another girl that caught my eyes, but I understood that none of these girls are good for me. I saw that I have to focus my attention on the Word and my destiny.

That was why my grandpa failed from the illustration in that dream.

title: Healing For My Family
description: On 23 April 2020, I saw God removing painful lumps from the legs of my family members. This included me, deck, my mum, Ina chisa, etc. We were also showing the lumps as proofs of what God did for us.

title: Providence for my Family
description:
On 22 April 2020, In my dream I saw that my family has taken over my grandparents house. We were now the one running things there.

I was favored with #3,000 by my mum after frank failed to borrow me #100. I knew that my mum's earning capacity has been increased.

Frank worked as a barber. Mimi was also around. I knew that money was coming on my way.

Prior to this scene, I went to a test hall to probably take a test.

title: Caution on Mummy Oluchi
description: On 19 April 2020, in my dream, mummy Oluchi wanted to supply me with products to sell on my own. I didn't accept because I didn't have the clearance in my spirit. I just wanted to continue doing my works with my PC.

title: The Giving Test
description:
On 19th April 2020, I met someone in my dream. It was a time of hunger, and I didn't have enough money with me.

I encountered this person on the road and I asked him how he was, he said fine, but was hungry.
In my heart, I had compassion for him so I ignored my lack and gave him #200 which was the last cash on me. He was relieved and turned to go buy something. He didn't say thanks though, I thought he was too hungry that he forgot.

When I woke up, it occurred to me this was a test.

title: The Night Crew
description: On 17 April 2020, In my dream, I was among a group of young believes that normally travel at night to locations where they will host revival programs. On one occasion, I felt like the leaders at the church we visited were feeling jealous of my grace, and my fellows confirmed.

title: I'm A Prophet
description: On 15 April 2020, I was told in my dream by God that I'm to get words from him and translate it to those he is giving to.

title: Quality Time With Siblings
description: On 11 April 2020, I saw in my dream, me and my siblings having quality time by watching football. I later saw from a second dream how I was buying fried noodles for them.

title: Reconnecting with Nobel Tom
description: On 11 April 2020, in my dream, I got in touch with Nobel Tom on a phone, after a long time of being apart.

title: Forgiving Ignatius
description: On 11 April 2020, in my dream I had to go back to Ignatius to help sort out a friend's record. Because of the emotional pains I've had there in the past, I found it difficult to help anyone there.

title: Time Out with Ebenezer
description:
On 9 April, 2020, In my dream, I went to a church named house on the rock.

I saw sir Niza there and asked him if he decided to join the congregation of the brethren.
We gave offerings and gifts then the minister declared blessings us. 

I and Niza spent sometime talking at the end of service.

I noticed that sir Niza whose full name is Ebenezer had scares around his arm. 
The meaning of his name is "stone of help" which happens to be in a "house on the rock".

title: The Ignored One
description: On 7 April, 2020, In a dream, I was having a house cleanup with my family. We were so busy that we didn't notice that Jesus was there. He wanted attention, but got none. On his way out, my eyes were opened and I called him, Jesus. He turned his face toward me, his face was grieved, then he exited-out. I exclaimed to my family that Jesus was here and we didn't even noticed. I went out to look for him but he was gone. When I woke up, I was so touched that our lord was with us but our busy lives wouldn't accommodate him. I asked him in prayer of what to do in order to correct the dream. He first gave me a clear understanding of the dream's meaning. The dream speaks of the church and the owner. My family represents the members of the church, the busy life represents the tons of things we do that doesn't give room for Jesus to have quality time with us. Next, he gave me a simple solution which we can practice on our own to grow in intimacy and friendship with him.

title: The Goodbyes
description: On the 6 April, 2020, I was saying my goodbyes to some people living around me. My belongings were weighed around 3.2gb.

title: Dancing In The Spirit
description: On the 4 April, 2020, in my dream we were dancing in the Spirit. Our refreshment drink was olive oil.

title: Jamb Result
description: On the 3 April, 2020, I had a dream where Adaugo has clues from her dream regarding the status of jamb result for Frank. Frank & my mum were anticipating the result.

title: The Math Test
description: On the 2 April, 2020, In my dream, I saw me taking test on fractions and triangles. I understood the answer, but I still had to ask the Holy Spirit for help.

title: The Reunion
description: On the 1 April, 2020, I met a whole bunch of my class, level, friends and roommates all in one room in my dream. I was trying to help Nuel change his iPhone.

title: The Job Seeking
description: On the 31 March, 2020, In my dream, I saw justice and later pastor asking me to find a job place for them, specifically an indomie deport. The best I want to do is bring out a list of businesses like that in Port Harcourt, but they wanted me to go with them, which I can't, because I'm engaged in my works.

title: Electricity Restoration in Dream
description: On the 29 March, 2020, I saw an electricity guy come to fix our light in the neighborhood. Everyone was compelled to hook up with the new connection. The connection will let me be more effective with GIT services. Generators were hated and seized and decommissioned.

title: Mission in Suits
description:
On 19 October 2020, I saw from my dream me and the Salvation ministry man in charge of sweeping were part of a secret service. He was my teacher and superior officer. We work in a school and I'm a student in this school but the both of us are always tasked to go retrieve a laptop which contains classified information from another location. Each time we return, we seems to speed into the school like we were being chased. He will always get me running in and guiding me like a snipper or assassin is targeting us, but we always made it in. This happened about three times in the dream.

What will happen next is that another team of agents from a different department is given access to this computer for data extraction before leaving. They seems to be waiting for us already each time we return from a mission. All the agents were dressed in suits in this dream, including me. I felt like a rookie in training, not having full understanding of what is going on.

title: Glory Defense
description: On 27 September 2020, in my dream, I just graduated from a class after an exam. My classmate and friend who is a girl visited me before my departure. She came with two big bottles of juice and two baked bread. We hanged out in my auntie's house and we were having a great time. She even hesitantly didn't want me to come with the movie, it was my idea but she agreed anyway; she just wanted my company. We saw my aunty in the kitchen side preparing a dish. She came over but wasn't too happy about us. The girl stood up for me and started testifying of my goodness and impact in her life to my aunty. At this point, my aunty couldn't believe what she was hearing; I myself was surprised by her defense for me, but my aunty was satisfied with the report. On closing the dream, I saw that this beautiful girl was Glory.

title: The Promotional Exam
description: On 10 October 2020, In my dream I found myself taking a math exam in a hall after passing through some challenges to get to the venue and I was ready.

title: Journey With Zadia
description: On 16 June 2020, I saw Kevin Zadia taking us on a bus journey, he saved us a lot of time with the police, he knew how to get through them without getting stopped.

title: Unrecognizable Me
description:
On 19th April 2020, In my dream, I met some people from my past. They were all hustling and shifting jobs to make more money. They included chukwugbe, Fjt & ikechikwu.

When they saw me, they all wished they were me in someway and was even surprised of me.
On my way back, I kept on thanking God that I met him and held on to him.

title: The Gift Within A Gift
description: On 14 October 2020, in my dream, I went to a package dispatch center where gifts were kept for some selected winners and I was one of them. Before I got there, others have already taken the gifts that seems important leaving only a bicycle pump for me. Meanwhile, all the gifts came in pairs, so everyone took home a double gift, but mine was only one insignificant package. At first I thought it was a waste of my time then an image came to my mind. The image indicated that within the least important package is the most important gift. In my mind, I saw what looked like a cheque hidden with the bicycle pump.

title: Beware of the Past
description:
On 12 October 2020, in my dream a girl from my past pass by from school and saw me in my reach out. She quickly complained to me about an reddened skin on her waistline that hurts her. I asked her if I could pray for her, she consented and I prayed without physically touching her buttock. And instantly, her red pains gone.

Next I start thinking in my mind if this person is my wife, and immediately Glory flashed back into and then I awoke. After the dream, I knew that this girl from my past represent any female from past that I've shared close moments with.
I saw rejoice, ugochika, etc.

title: The Visit to Nworiuebe
description: On 11 October 2020, In my dream I saw me visit Nworiuebe and was set to attend the church second service. With an intention to see glory.

title: Lesson from the Harlot
description: On 10 August 2020, I had a warning dream of me having sex with some prostitutes along some bunch of friends in my aunt's apartment, and I didn't enjoy it. The whole house was messed up and I didn't like it. The dream all ended with shame and regret on my side, and my aunt found out and was disappointed in me. I saw Daniel who was the man behind the arrangement of these friends and prostitutes. At the end I was asked by the prostitute what have you learnt? I thought to myself if only I had a wife I wouldn't have been in this situation, then glory flashed into my mind in the dream.

title: Reconnecting with Glory
description:
On 16 September 2020, I saw Glory on a green gown with a red hat singing in the choir as I intentionally walked by. 

I just wanted to see her face, she saw mine and their were smiles on her face, but I didn't make any communications facially or verbally because I didn't like that she hasn't called me since she promised.

After the dream, I realized that I was wrong. I don't know everything and I shouldn't let her behavior stop me from talking to her.

title: The Truth About Me & Glory
description:
On 3 August 2020, I saw in my dream me helping glory rise up in her gifting and calling by having her back and being there for her, assuring her of peace. Copa Courage was helping me out in the process.

And it turns out that I loved and supported her, covering her shame and embarrassment.

title: More Than A Seed
description:
On 23 July 2020, I saw Glory laying on a mat and a little cold. Their was Peter shielding her legs from the cold, so I took that place feeling that I should be the one guarding her.

On exiting the dream, this song boiled down from my spirit, "You're more than a seed, thank you Jesus"

title: Glory Coming Around
description: On 1 July 2020, In my dreams I saw glory coming around my house. My flatmates and I were watching movies together. The scene repeated twice.

title: The Speedster Battle
description:
On 9 October 2020, I was watching a the flash series in my dream. And in this episode the flash faced a big bad that has the ability to copy his speed and instinct.

This was an archenemy and the most dangerous of them. The speedster narrowly escaped living this big bad with another nemesis. He escaped living to restrategize and come up with a plan to defeat his adversary.

His adversary went about robbing rich homes as the flash thinks of a wise plan to defeat this numbskull.

This dream was so real and thrilling that by just being an observer I felt every bit of the vibs and feels.

title: The Course Mate
description: On 8 October 2020, In my dream after concluding an exam, on exiting the hall I saw Glory walk in for the next exam and took a seat at the front row. She smiled at me with an expression on her face saying, "I know what i'm doing." I tried to talk with her but I couldn't, it was like an invisible hand was keeping me distant from her.

title: First Look at Nnaemaka
description: On 4 October 2020, I saw Nnemka in my dream. He was ready to go back to school. I had discussions with him pertaining GoShop and things he had learnt. He told me that he has been following and that he will be using that material for teaching on the youth day! We did visitations to our houses. He too something from my house like an old wooden sculpture that I don't use any more.

title: The Arrogant Drive
description: On 1 October 2020, I saw in my dream Uncle Loyed arrogantly driving us in his car.

title: The Power of God
description: On 23 September 2020, while walking in my dream, God started speaking to me using people. Finally, I was AG2 and all the people their young and old were speaking to me like they were fully taken over by God. They told me quite a lot, but I can't remember what they said to me. But I remembered being filled with the power of God after the conversation ended. I felt a huge surge of light filled me from the inside to the outside. Next I just waved my hands, and a force from me will pull both people and things aside. I felt like a strong power came over me after I accepted what I was told by those people in the church. Emotions: I felt like I was told some truth about me which came as a shock to me. I felt pained because of my ignorance. I felt completely taken over by God after that conversation.

title: David Ugbueli Retreat
description: On 22 September 2020, I saw David Ugbueli in my dream. He was having a retreat in my house. He used my mum's room as his secret place; he doesn't let people come in. At the veranda he has an alter for himself. We talked but not much; couldn't remember what we discussed. And he doesn't want to be disturbed.

title: The Jungle of Life
description:
On 14 September 2020, I saw Perry Stone in my dream and I was telling him why he should write a book or more on how to navigate the jungles life. Because there was a lot of things to know about the jungle that most people don't know. 

I was getting him to know that people have to understand things pertaining the ebs and crux of the jungle. The geographical structure and landscapes of the jungle. Things to avoid and things to take advantage of in the jungle. Also of the historic events and seasons in the jungle. The ditches and conners of the jungle's pathway. 

I was telling him these because I was navigating through that Jungle with him and I had strong desire to smoothen the experience for others by telling them what to expect and what not to expect in the Jungle.

title: The Deceiver
description: On 12 September 2020, Me and glory agreed to join resources together in thanking the lord for everything he has been doing in our lives. We wanted to prepare him a baked bread and present to him in the church and we were delighted to do it together. But a man came around temporarily interrupting that arrangement by lying to us that he own all the ingredients we needed when he had none. Later on as he revealed his skim to us and laughing in a devilish manner because of the time he had delayed us. I was filled with a holy anger so I pronounced a terminal curse with my finger pointed at him because of my understanding that I'm God's servant. Then me and glory left to go look for a place we could have all the ingredients we needed, after I had encouraged her that we can still find a shop were we can have all that we wanted.

title: Insidious Wispers
description:
On 12 September 2020, I saw some soldiers came around and whispered somethings to my mum and sister. They didn't tell me because they didn't want me to know.

Emotions:
I felt suspicious of these soldiers that they were up to no good.

title: The Wild Birds
description: On 12 September 2020, I killed some wild birds with stones among their flocks. They came near my house, so they lost four of their members with my stones. These birds were the kind people eat. They had black feathers with a mix of blue and walk in flocks.

title: Overcoming With Zadai
description: On 10 September 2020, In my dream I saw Kevin Zadai rejoicing because his kids was among those that triumph in a competition. One of those kids was from Nigeria and another from South Africa. His kids were even better and smarter in navigating their ways through the competition; he was even surprised when he found that his kids won beyond his expectation.

title: Fleeing from Fornication
description: On 9 September 2020, In my dream I met a girl who tried to get me into fornication by trying to conjure a scripture that doesn't exist in the bible. What happened was that I left her and the last exam they were writing and ran away from her all together for the sake of not falling for that sin and betraying the Lord.

title: Revelation of the Night
description: On 8 September 2020, I saw me and courage fishing and swimming in deep waters. I caught a thieve tonight trying to steal money from my wallet, it seems to be her pattern in the past but I caught and stopped her. I heard oyedepo gave a comment, you can take a horse to drink, but if it want to grow you must eat.

title: Buying Bread
description: On 6 september 2020, I bought round breads worth #700 in my dream, in tended to make some changes.

title: Missing You Cozy
description:
On 2 September 2020, In my dream after staying with LFC Nwaorieubi people for a while it was now time for me to leave but I've already made a lot of bonding and influences on them. They even had a name for me called Cozy.

In this dream I saw pastor Chris Sunday, Copa David, Chigemezu, and a whole bunch of people.
Copa David was going to leave because he couldn't continue with the Job at choco.
We killed a bush meat on the ceiling after returning from a farewell football game for me. Some boys made an animation of the whole game for me.
Later, I checked out the meaning of Cozy and Merriam Webster dictionary defined it as:
suggesting or showing a closeness between two people, groups, businesses, etc.: very close

title: Gov Wike Bad Bad Bad
description: I saw Gov. Wike raiding Rivers state for the purpose of securing an electoral position for himself or some other person and he was up to no good. His attitude showed that of a gangster with mindset of securing this position by all means.

title: Instructions for Others by the Holy Spirit in a Dream
description: On 1 September 2020, I saw me receiving instructions for others by the Holy Spirit in my dream.

title: Joel Osteen in Dream - Kicked out of Church and Work
description:
On 21 August 2020, In dream I saw Joel Osteen. He was kicked out of his church and out of his work. I was working in the new place where he was now working.

First I had sympathy on him for losing his work and ministry. On spending two minutes with him, I saw that he was a materialistic and troublesome person.

title: The Guitar Desire
description: On 26 August 2020, In my dream, I was learning how play the guitar strings.

title: Public Speaking
description: On 25 August 2020, In my dream, I was in various meetings with foreigners watching public speaking. I also the drama and justice that happens their. It was like a public speaking auditioning.

title: Beat 2
description: On 13 August 2020, In dream I went back to a house and location I used to stay, I found out that the guys are still vacating. Victor and I had bread together before going on evangelism very early. I got a beat and shared it with courage that played for me.

title: Fisher Man
description: On 22 August 2020, I saw my mum advising Alex in front a large pond, disapproving his life style and choices. In the pond there was some many fishes to the extent that you can use your hand to catch them. I caught one with my bare hands, and also picked up a bow to catch more.

title: Madness ln Hell
description:
On 14 August 2020, I had dream where I was sorted after by different men in the arm forces in a whole area because I did something or took something away from them.

They were all out to capture me, but I ran into a secret place. Ps 91

title: Baptism of the Holy Spirit
description: On 14 August 2020, I had dream where I saw my brothers receiving the power of God, the Holy Spirit in other to produce results.

title: Songs To Elohim
description: On 11 August 2020, In my dreams, I got people singing and dancing to my songs. Even hard hearted policemen singing to my song. And when I was asked my secret, I saw me writing on a surface "Elohim".

title: Song of Promotion
description: On 21 July 2020, In my dream there was a promotion coming and my mum was certain of its arrival. The promotion came as a song in verses, a part of the song was given to me, another to Glory and the other part to the rest of song crew. Favor was part of this crew.

title: Holy Spirit Manifestations
description: On 17 July 2020, In my dream I saw AJS in his meeting. There were manifestations of healing and deliverance where everywhere while they prayed.

title: Ruining The Show
description:
On 14 July 2020, In my dream I saw how my presence ruins the show for the devil. I caught a spy girl who couldn't disappear again after I caught her at my backyard. I forced her to leave after giving her a hot set of slaps on the face.
Occultic men had to pay me off with $2,500 to leave their presence because they can't do nothing to me.

title: Local Curse Enforcers
description: On 12 July 2020, In my dream my grand pa revealed to me that the reason why the young people I saw remained small was that their LGI is responsible for them not to manifest their gifts.

title: Justice
description: On 10 July 2020, I was treated unfairly by a barber, and the lord triggered someone to tell me that because of this I would be having flocks of barbershop. I was treated unfairly by someone in the field of software development, and I was moved to go open my own.

title: Observing the CEO and Dream Insights
description: On 1 July 2020, In my dream I've been strategically placed close to a founder of a company who is sent home cause he is sick. His company which deal with visual electronic like computers, sketch screens, flat screens, and high quality printers. I was getting to know this man and also taking note of all these equipments used for producing awesome visual material. I also caught and was straggling a thieve that stole my app and was monetizing for the wrong reasons. I'm still getting warnings about a young girl in from my church.

title: Drug Abuse Among Youths
description: On 28 June 2020, I saw in my dream youths wasting away in drug abuse.

title: Me & Aunty Chich
description: On 28 June 2020, I saw in my dreams me and my aunt chimenyme buying cups of rice from a malam in the market place.

title: Victor & Angel - Dream Message
description: On 25 June 2020, In my dream victor was telling me about what my angel was saying concerning what I can next. And Daniel was also their to take me there

title: Worldly Principle of Money
description: On 20 June 2020, In my dream I saw chizaram beaten up by some boy. I also saw some talk show guys teaching some worldly money principles that only bring stress.

title: The Charity Project
description: On 26 July 2020, the Lord told me to start buying packages of products and give to the poor. He wants me to be charitable to people. This he revealed to me in our intimate times. He gave me a picture of me purchasing and distributing products to people.

title: Be Hospitable and Solve Problems
description: On 9 May 2021, the Lord told me to Be hospitable to people, God is making you a helper to many; better be ready for a big house. Don't chase people away instead advise and encourage them always account for other people when making your plans. Two people in marriage are two imperfect people: Your wife is not perfected neither are you. Your assignment is the problem God has created you to solve, in your home, family, community, church, nation and the world.

title: Repair The Bike
description:
On 4 April 2021, Today, before going to church I thought about what I can do for my mum transportation issue. I wanted to buy a new bike for her which was quite expensive at the moment for me.

The Holy Spirit intercepted that line of thought and asked me to repair the existing bike instead. All we need is to buy a new engine and install the supporting parts and that will solve the problem.

The solution I received from the Holy Spirit is better than spending a fortune on something that could have been repaired the right way.

title: What Happened at Shiloh 2020
description:
On 4 December 2020, the lord told me that I'll be going to Nworieubi for Shiloh. I immediately started preparing by ironing my clothing and setting my affairs right.

By 3 o'clock on 7 December 2020 I was ready to go and the rains just started pouring. I rebuked that rain 17 minutes later I was on my way to Nworieubi.

I got their by after 5 that, I was on fasting for the entire week of Shiloh. Everyone were glad to see me, and all those that heard about me were anticipating to see me.

Mummy victor was so glad to see me, but the excitement of my pastor's wife was without competition. She was so happy to see me in person. In essence, the news about my presence spread so quickly like a wild fire. I was like a kingdom celebrity.

At night I had two dreams about the territorial spirit and its hoard of devils. Also I had a dream about glory.

The next day at evening, I saw glory herself on her blue gown taking care of the children's department. There i met her and had a brief discussion, obviously there was something not right about her.

I had already heard about the situation between glory and Zion, I was seeing Zion all over her, almost all the time. I was just moved to whack the hornet's net and I approached him face to face and ask him directly about the relationship thing I was hearing about. He was affirmative and dragged in glory to confirm his claims, but she didn't.

This left us all fragmented and with difficulties communicating together. This went on for two days.

Meanwhile, the Lord was using me to address, correct, and strengthen a lot of people. On the Wednesday I was asked by Mummy's Oluchi to take the Shiloh specialized classes which occurred for 3 days. It was an amazing experience, God used that platform to distribute all the revelations he has given me in those areas. And everyone was blessed.

Moving on to Thursday, I was pressed in my spirit to talk to someone about glory and the claims of Zion. But my spirit kept rejecting those I thought of conversing with until I was lead to speak with mummy Oluchi. She was the right person for fixing everything, God was working under the hood through people.

Mummy Oluchi explained everything to me from a-z and immediately discerned that it was God's will for me and glory to be together. She was so assuring to me and already knew what to do spiritually and physically. From thence fort everything changed including my attitude towards her. It was now based on understanding. I followed all the instructions she gave to me and glory was unhooked from Zion like a joke.

Beforehand, God had told me the end of this in a dream immediately I came to Nworieubi but I didn't know the process to attain that physically, but God worked through us and got things done!

I had two periods with glory one on one, and I told her my interest in her, and how God has pointed me to her using 33 dreams, visions, thought impression to confirm his word. Not to mention other ways and things.

On the Friday I told her the truth and asked her to go pray about it. On the second meeting which was on Monday, the day she asked me to sacrifice, I did that and more questions were answered, misunderstandings were clarified, and assurances were hosted in our hearts. We left there smiling at each other. That confirmed the dream I was given early Tuesday morning.

Before I told her the truth, I prayed in the spirit for hours starting from 3am asking God validations before I told her the truth.

I came back to Ahoada with a new understanding, and greater faith in God able to do what he has promised me. I also came back with greater anointing and a focus for my next year. I was corrected, and encouraged, I had my Encounters with God's word and it was a win for me.

What happened at Shiloh 2020 is so huge that it will answer for the rest of my life.

title: The Charge to Upkeep
description:
On 3 April 2021, While I was watching some teachings from Bishop Oyedepo and Dr. Myles, I heard speak on the same thing. They said that a man must wealthy spiritually, soulically, and physically.

Immediately, the Holy Spirit started ministering to me about health state. He implied that I haven't taken care of myself properly with the food I eat and most especially, the water I drink.

title: Buying A Piano for Winners Chapel Church
description: On 2 April 2021, I was discussing with the lord about what I'm to buy for the church for the next 2 months and I got to understand of what I'm supposed to buy for the month of April but I didn't know for the month of May. So I thought I should leave it until I get an instruction. While praying in the spirit, I had this thought from the Lord dropped into my mind 'buy a piano for winners Chapel church'. For a moment I was a bit unsettled in my heart about that thought. Looking at my income, I thought it won't be enough after buying a piano; then I'll have little left over. So after some contemplation and knowing that God can supply all of our needs according to His riches through Christ Jesus (Philippians 4:19), I've decided not only will the Lord provide for me but also expand my financial power so I could buy it.

title: Spiritual Investment
description:
On 8 March 2021, the Lord said this word to me regarding my financial investments. This happened when I saw the amount I was to forward into the kingdom.

I want you to master spiritual investment before physical investment. The spiritual is the platform on which your physical investments will stand. And don't think that anything you invest in the kingdom goes unrewarded, actually the reverse is the case, what you're doing is sowing a seed that will bring mighty reward. Just follow the guidance I've already given you and you'll be cool.

It finally hit me to see that saying "I'll give so-so percentage if God gives me such finances is not a joke". I saw that his plan to introduce me to the higher realm of finances incrementally was the best, and I've agreed with him on his plan.

title: The Next Level On Giving
description:
On 28 February 2021, during that Sunday service I asked the Holy Spirit for a new instruction on my finances seeing that I needed to increase. He gave me the following instructions.

Its time to increase, whenever you get finances from your work give a #1,000 each for kingdom projects, cathedral project, and prophet offerings. 

Upgrade the minimum giving for kingdom projects, cathedral project, and prophet offerings to #200 each. 

Multiply the people giving by two which is now #600.

title: Code Briefing With Holy Spirit
description:
On 8 February 2021, the Spirit instructed me on the areas to focus on improving my code development. He said Just learn how to present your ideas with VueJs. Your focus should be on the frontend.

- Learn how to consume APIs.
- Demonstrate a good understanding of how to work with backend services.
- Master frontend application security.
- Incorporate various visual elements in your UI designs.
- And master the production and deployment of PWAs.

title: The Investment Plan
description:
On 20 September 2020, the Holy Spirit said to me that each time I withdraw money some tokens of it should go to the poor, like the elderly, widows, widowers and orphans. Some tokens to the little children, some to the men of God, and also to kingdom projects.

Eccl 11:1-6

title: Night Prayer Strategy
description:
On 7 February 2021, I received the following instructions for securing my night prayers. 

Don't sleep off during your time out with the Holy Spirit.
Take your shower immediately you come back from GTC even before you eat.
Eat something and tell your family not to wake you even if they cooked a meal.
Call or text glory before nine o'clock.
Go to bed meditating on the scripture with the music playing in your ears.

title: Strategy For My Brothers
description: On 24 January 2021, the Lord gave me this word after I asked him for a solution to the behaviors of my brothers. He said "Whenever you rebuke your brothers for their misbehaviors, always go back and explain to them why you rebuked them and also tell them what to do for them to become better. Also commend them for every good act as well."

title: Spending Limit on Calls
description: On 17 January 2021, after a call with glory, my mum was concerned about my spending on calls which didn't occur to me like a big deal then. But by thinking about I saw that the Lord was giving me a red flag on my spending rates on calls and counselled me to use the following approaches. Don't spend more than 1k a month on calls (I saw that I was getting up to 4k a month) that wasn't good. Before you call think about what you want to say and say it rather than wasting airtime. Its not must you should send her money or airtime all time this should be done periodically as the Spirit leads. Even your 1k plan a month should be frugally used not to be consumed at once.

title: My Code Development Process
description: On 13 January 2021, The Lord made it clear to me that he isn't telling me to abandon my stack and go learn ReactJs. He wants me to just repackage my stack in an attractive way so I could get recruiters interested in me. He also wants me to make my VueJs track record irresistible to people out there. He further suggests focusing on PWA for cross-platform applications.

title: Juicing Faith to Family
description: On 22 November 2020, the Lord told me to start shifting my family's mentality by engaging them in the practical acts of faith.

title: Open Declarations
description: On 15 November 2020, Declare your expectations when you wake up every morning before you begin your prayers. Speaks them boldly, it will be Jesus speaking not you. Let the devils and the elements here the voice of the Lord through your words. Learn the oracles of Balaam, use the word of God as your oracle. Understand the Ezekiel's command, "son of man".

title: Warning on Women & The Devil
description: On 1 July 2020, The Holy Spirit said that the enemy is out there trying to catch me using my weakness. He said that he will try to use any woman that I try to get close to. That's why I must depend on him to get an appropriate woman for me.

title: Don't be Addicted
description: On 30 October 2020, the Lord told me not to be addicted to any minister of the Gospel and their teachings. That his word should be what I can be addicted to. He made me understand that each of his men have been given a certain ministry and the gifting to bless the body of Christ. That I should embrace my uniqueness and work with what he is telling me to do. That I can learn from them, but can't become them. That I can't even be him (Jesus) but I can surly imitate and learn of him. He want me to preserve my uniqueness that was the summary of the message.

title: Sowing To God's Men
description: On 16 August, 2020 The Lord told me that I will be sowing into the lives of men of God soon. This will produce return for you in your ministry.

title: County Assignment Update
description: On 30 October 2020, the Lord told me to start taking other classes in county high school as well. That other classes should here the messages too. That he sent me there for all classes in county high school.

title: Season of Appearing on the Fig Tree Parable in Mark 13
description: On 24 October 2020, the Lord spoke the word 'season of appearing' to me, and as always I have to do some research and spot out where the Lord thought about his season of appearing in Mark 13 on the parable of the fig tree. This season proceeded from a previous season marked with progressive and recursive chaos, crisis & disasters on the earth. And after which follows a season of appearing.

title: Speaking in The Bus
description:
On 1 September, 2020 the Lord told me that I'll be speaking in the bus to people, and I froze. I didn't want to do that because I've not done things like that before. He told me that he want to get me bolder, and my flesh will always put up a fight.

He told me that at the time I'll speak the Holy Spirit will inspire me on what to say. 
It was not my favorite thing to do, but the lord reminded me of my vow to him.

He also told me that he isn't forcing me because of the vow, he just want me to do it from my own volition.

title: Life Style Evangelism
description: On 6 September 2020, the lord told me that my soul winning work is still very poor. I asked what then should I do? He told me to not make it a weekly event but a lifestyle.

title: Speak to the Students - GoShop at Western Ahoada County High School
description:
On 27 September 2020, the Lord spoke to me during the service that I should start speaking to students during devotions, their schools starts on the 5th. This came as a result of asking him for a word in the service.

As we sang a hymn I remembered my high school days and immediately he spoke to me to talk to the students again as I did in my high school days.

On 16 October 2020, I started GoShop at Western Ahoada County High School and it was epic.

title: Supernatural Provision
description:
The Lord wants us to invest in the following:
X2 animal cages.
X1 animal trap.
X4 fishing cages. 
A lengthy bird net. 
A house garden. 

These will be his devices for supernatural provisions.

These idea came immediately I gained the understanding of the wild dreams.

title: The Golden Now
description: On 11 September 2020, the Holy Spirit showed me a lot about my future and how everything is rigged for me. He showed me that nothing is really impossible for me with him. I saw that I'm going to be so influential and dominating in the areas he has graced me with.

title: Sowing to Testimonies
description: On 6 September 2020, the lord told me that testifiers will also be having a link to sow into another person's testimony. So I should start sowing into peoples testimonies to be a participant.

title: The Hand of God
description: On 28 July 2020, the Lord gave me a Prophetic picture of me laying hands on people at the Friday night meetings, and they are falling under his power. And he is assuring me that when I'll lay my hands on people that he is gonna touch them.

title: Pray for souls

title: The Principal Thing

On 14 June 2020, the lord told me to get wisdom first in all I do. Prov 4:7
To get wisdom, I've to go through the pipeline of knowledge and spend time with understanding then I'll get wisdom.
He told me that my readings and studies should be focused now on the seeds I have been given.

title: Onward Assignment
description: If you will go out for soul wining as your work, produce and teach kingdom materials, and also be charitable then you'll never lack a thing.

title: Influence & Control
description:
On 9 January 2021, while meditating on Matt 24:29 the Lord opened my mind to understand how the spiritual world controls the physical, everyone and everything in it. 'Immediately after the anguish of those days, the sun will be darkened, the moon will give no light, the stars will fall from the sky, and the powers in the heavens will be shaken. Matthew 24:29 NLT
I saw from this scripture a relationship between the sun, moon, and the stars with the powers of the heavens. This heavens is not talking about the one where God dwells but the second heaven (space) where the controlling powers dwell. The sun, moon, and stars represents the governmental structure of the world. You can see this same structure in the family of Jocob which became the governmental structure of Israel.
New Living Translation Genesis 37:9 Soon Joseph had another dream, and again he told his brothers about it. 'Listen, I have had another dream,' he said. 'The sun, moon, and eleven stars bowed low before me!' The Lord started telling me that the whole world and everyone in it are controlled from the spiritual world. He said that the control is not in the form that we think, it has nothing to do with physical forces but influence. Influence is the technology for controlling the physical dimension from the spiritual. He told me that all men are controlled whether they like it or not. Then he reminded of a dream I had in the year 2020.
On 2 May 2020, I saw Perry stone in my dream, he was following me around, influencing me to make good decisions by just being around me. Perry Stone is a man of God, and men of God in dreams are representatives of God. That means God took his face to communicate with me in that dream.
Again, he reminded me of these scriptures:
New Living Translation Romans 8:6,9 So letting your sinful nature control your mind leads to death. But letting the Spirit control your mind leads to life and peace. But you are not controlled by your sinful nature. You are controlled by the Spirit if you have the Spirit of God living in you.
(New Living Translation) New Testament Romans 8:6-9
We know that we are children of God and that the world around us is under the control of the evil one.
The Passion translation puts it better... We know that we are God's children and that the whole world lies under the misery and influence of the Evil One. (New Living Translation Ephesians 2:1-3 Made Alive with Christ Once you were dead because of your disobedience and your many sins. You used to live in sin, just like the rest of the world, obeying the devil—the commander of the powers in the unseen world. He is the spirit at work in the hearts of those who refuse to obey God. All of us used to live that way, following the passionate desires and inclinations of our sinful nature. By our very nature we were subject to God's anger, just like everyone else.
These scriptures confirms that spiritual influence is the key to controlling the physical world and everyone in it. This is how the unseen realms control even our governmental structures today which in turn control the people under its rule. This is why anyone who learns to operate from the unseen realms gains advantage and control over his reality and people around him, both far and near.
Influence is a controlling technology that the spiritual world leverages upon in subjecting its will on the earth.

title: God Is Speaking - Ways To Know If Its God Speaking
description:
On the 22 January 2021, I received this inspiration on how to validate the voice of God. We'll use this simple verse from proverbs to test if its God speaking.

Proverbs 2:6 TPT:
Wisdom is a gift from a generous God, and every word he speaks is full of revelation and becomes a fountain of understanding within you.

*ALTERNATIVELY*

Proverbs 2:6 NLT:
For the Lord grants wisdom! From his mouth come knowledge and understanding.
The following characteristics will be met when God speaks to you:
1. You will gain a revelational-knowledge from him. You will leave the conversation with an information you didn't have before. That secret maybe about you, someone else, a thing, a place, or a time.
2. You'll gain an understanding of a thing, a question about you, or someone else. You'll leave the conversation with a clearer insight and explanation than you came with.
3. You'll gain access to a new plan or strategy on how to do something. It may be something that has been bugging or confusing you before, but after the conversation you'll know what to do.

God could tell you things about your life, family, someone else, your church, your world, or about a thing using the following ways:
- The Word
- The Spirit 
- Dreams
- Visions 
- Thoughts Impression 
- Other people 
- Situations 
- Nature
- etc

But you must look for those characters above in the communications to verify.

As you continue to grow in the Word and Spirit of God, it will become easier for you to know when God speaks. And lastly, please do yourself a favor and buy a note and pen to record everything that God tells you including the date and a corresponding title.

title: God's Ways
description: On 8 November 2020, the Lord inspired me with this revelation about his ways. When the lord shows up in your life, he isn't coming to work you through Satan's system and platform, he is coming with his own platform. Exo 24:10 The system on the earth is ruled and controlled by Satan and his minions. The people of the world are blind and deaf, absolutely unaware of the spiritual realities around them. They've no resistance at all against the devil. They're basically mind controlled like zombies. 2 Chor 4:3-4 The Lord demands that you license him with your prayers so he can intervene on your behalf, this is why men ought to pray and not to faint. And men have to pray without ceasing. Jer 29:10-14 Don't expect the Lord to play by Satan's rules. And don't expect his ways to be like Satan's, neither should you think his result will manifest like Satan's. 1 Sam 17:47 The ways of God isn't like the Satan's ways. The Lord's ways are always several notches higher than Satan's ways, that's why the devil can never checkmate God. Ish 55:8-11 God sees the end from the beginning and so he has set the equation to turn out for his favor, no matter how hard the enemy tries. The enemy is in the game board but God plays from outside the game board. He sees more than the devil could ever. That's why he seats on his throne and laughs at his enemies. Ish 46:9-10, Ps 2:1-4 And the way the Lord intervenes for his people are unpredictable, just like the wind. John 3:8, Eccl 11:5 There are more people working against God than their are with God. Anyone walking in the flesh is working against God, even most Christians. Rom 8:7-8 Satan uses the corruption of the flesh to hook people up with his system. They serve him without knowing, and are deceived into thinking they're in charge. Eph 2:1-3

title: Why You Must Watch
description:
On 24 December 2020, the Lord explained things to me in regards to night prayers while studying Mark 14:32-42.

The Lord Jesus opened my eyes to the understanding of night prayers. The following point were extracted from the revelation:

The night time is a time designated for matters crucial to your destiny and only serious people get to participate on this destiny legislation timeline. v32-34
Its a time slot allocated for editing matters of destiny by removing what you don't want to see and adding what you want to see all according to God's will. v35-36
The minimum time to invest in this night periods to make a notable change is one hour, yea, its in your bible, I was shocked to see it myself. v37
It was also revealed to me that the reason why people give in to temptation is because they don't pray at these night sessions. v38
One last thing that was revealed to me is that in each night period, you've about three chances to effect changes to your destiny, else you'll miss it and face the consequences later.

Its quite interesting to know that in Israel their about three watching time when soldiers take turns in protecting the city. The first being from 6pm-10pm, second from 10pm-2am, and from 2am-6am. 

It was while men slept that the enemy sowed his tares amongst the wheat. While you're sleeping all night, the enemy is busy sowing all night in your farm. Matt 13:25

Note, the minimum is an hour, scripturally accurate, this will help you not to give in to futuristic temptations. You could see that the disciples gave in to the temptations by deserting Jesus and running away. That wouldn't have happened if only they watch and prayed!

title: The Devil Tell No Future
description:
On 6 November 2020, Don't let the devil in on your steering wheel! A warning I got on meditating on God's efficacy to perform his word. Ish 46:9
I got a firm understanding that no being can predict the future except God Act 1:7. Not the angels or devils.
The devil does not know my future or what is about to happen next in my life. John 3:8
If a person gets a prophecy and its not from me, then its a lie. If you agree to that lie, then you've given the devil permission to work on your life. He immediately begin to work by creating this circumstances which are lies. When you see them you don't rebuke them anymore because you've already agreed with him.
The devil can't tell you your future, rather he will give you accurate information on things that have taken place in your life. This process are carried out by the familia spirits. Once they gain your trust, they insert their lies as a prediction of what is to happen and you believe it as well because you discern not.
For example, the devil could lie to you that you will die, right after telling you somethings that have happened to you in the time past. Because you've believed the information they told you about your past, you believe what they also tell you about the future as being accurate as well. And once you believe their word they help you steer your life in that direction and they help you wreck your life. You can observe Paul and the spirit of divination in the slave girl. Act 16:16
Only the lord can tell you the truth about you. Believe his word, believe also his genuine prophet and so you'll prosper. 2 Chr 20:20

title: The Wedding at Odiereke
description:
On 22 November 2020, in the Sunday service I was illuminated by the Holy Spirit to remember 20 November 2020, Mimi's traditional marriage. Before leaving for the marriage I asked the Lord to do a miracle with my mind focused on Jesus first miracle in the wedding of Canaan.

When I arrived, I hesitated not to give Mimi my gift, a wedding ring I've purchased from Jumia under the instruction of the Holy Spirit. Some moment later, Mimi called me in and told me that they have problem with fuel. That they don't have fuel and requested for my help. At first I didn't want to give them because I've reserved that money for my grandpa, but with the prompting of the Holy Spirit, I gave #500 for the fueling.

Now in the church service today, the Holy Spirit told me that my prayer was answered by that help I offered Mimi. I was surprised and obviously didn't thought of it like that. All the seeds I've sowed to Mimi in her wedding were all seed for what is coming on my way. I sowed heavily in that marriage under the instructions of the Holy Spirit.

And someday I'll be teaching people this principle.

title: Soulical Realm Communication Insights
description: The soul is the medium of communication between the physical to the spiritual and the spiritual to the physical. This communication medium can be private when thoughts originate from you but public when they come from external sources, such as a friend or spirit.

I also saw interviews of top testifiers on our network like sid roth's.

title: Praying In the Spirit
description:
On 10 September 2020, I got this inspiration that, Praying in spirit does more than we've found out yet. When you pray in spirit you are not babbling words but opening up a connection or a portal where you can receive from heaven and send to heaven.

For example, if I have a question, I could be asking questions and receiving answers in my thoughts while praying in the Spirit. And there can be many things happening at once while praying in spirit. It's not only sending a message to Heaven.
