title: A New Way To Pray
description: On 21 July 2020, I've just be clarified that I shouldn't pray for myself but for all those in the body of Christ that are in similar situation then as God answers, he answers mine as well. And I also gain more because I'm using on stone to kill a flock of birds.

title: Receiving From Heaven - On 11 June 2020, The Holy Spirit opened up my understanding to know that everything we need for life and godliness has already been given to us, all we need is to access them.
description: I could buy data of 5gb for 1k but I've been buying 3gb for 1k on a slow network all these while. That resource has always been available to me but because I'm unaware and unengaged, I didn't profit from it. Not until I was informed by Helen and I started engaging it before I enjoyed it. The Holy Spirit told me that to receive from heaven, I need to be informed of what is available to me and how to access them. Listening to him and asking him to reveal them to me is the way to go. He told me from Mark 4:24 that as I continue listening to him with desires to know more, more understanding will be given to me. Then I'll be able to utilize what is available to me.

title: The Bounce Back Effect
description: On 25 May 2020, the Holy Spirit was teaching me about the bounce back rate of doing good. By being good to my neighbors by giving, I've received more than I've given multiple times. This is called the bounce back effect of doing good. The Holy Spirit thought me that doing evil has an equivalent effects on people. He thought me that if you do good to people, they will seek for ways to do good back to you, whereas if you do them evil, their hearts will burn towards you and they will repay you with evil. Of course this is not linear in this fallen world but the principle is correct. This means it will work on majority of people. Good and evil have a reflective and bounce back effect.

title: The Esau Effect
description: On 26 May 2020, the Holy Spirit got me to understand that people are still selling their birthright till this day. He told me that people sell their destinies with immediate fleshly gratification. For example, a man of dignity having 5min sex with an underage girl only to be caught and losing his respect, resources and aborting his purpose. This happens everyday.

title: The Pictorial Language
description: On 17 May 2020, Jesus highlighted the following to me. When you see a recurrent image in your heart, it reveals the current happening in your life. You'll see them when they seems not to be there. After sometimes with the yielding to the Spirit they become.

title: Resilient Faith
description:
On 13 May 2020, I was checking on my desired laptop online. I've already asked God for it in prayers. I saw that the price has risen beyond what I intended to buy it at.

Just when I was looking for another PC with lower budget, God asked me, "will you allow the current state of things to detour your faith?" I quickly saw my wrong and got back to believing God for that PC regardless of the price.

title: Gospany - Ministry Direction
description: On 10 May 2020, while I was in the bathroom, I heard God tell me that he has not called me to open a church, but a company. He said that I will preach but not as a pastor over a normal church. He reminded me of "Gospany", a word I heard in my spirit while waking up in the morning of 18th March, 2020. He also remembered what he told me on the 17th January 2020 about my future ministry.

title: Restructuring Youthful Minds
description: On 4 May 2020, Seeing my brother Frank posting pure nonsense on Facebook, I was disgusted of what I read. While praying, the Holy Spirit told me to host a talk with them whenever I visit. He told me to invite there friends and relatives as well, teaching them how to cultivate good value through the principles of God. He said I should tell them that the world has thought them the wrong ways to success, that by following God's way, they will find true success in life. And also he told me to buy snacks to entertain them while they listen. He said I should get them comfortable chairs, paper and pen. And lead them to Christ as well as the gift discovery process.

title: Looks vs Works
description: On 7 May 2020, Which one of these would help people in life? Your looks or your works. If you say works, then how come you spend more time and energy on your looks than your works? If you say looks, well God help you come to understanding that you came to the earth to fulfill a function, because God never made anything for looks but to fulfill a function! Work gets you to fulfill that function!

title: Operating In The Supernatural
description:
On 6 May 2020, we do know that what is seen is made by the unseen. The supernatural realm births the natural realm. Operating in the supernatural is applying supernatural principles from the natural to cause results. It is executing actions in the natural standpoint that has spiritual implications and results. It is pressing the control buttons of the supernatural realms using a natural means.

Why do I say 'natural means'? It's because all you need to operate in the supernatural is already with you! For example, to be born again, you make a simple statement using your mouth.

What we must do to operate better in the supernatural is to study and apply the supernatural principles of the creator, written in his manual. With this I define miracle as a handshake of the natural with the supernatural.

title: List Funding
description: On 18 April 2021, The Lord told me that he will be giving me a list of people and projects to fund. That my job is to just fund the list.

title: Anointed For Work
description:
On 30 July 2020, during my intimate time with the Holy Spirit, I saw a horn with oil anointing my head. And I actually felt like there was a liquid substance on my head.

When I asked the Holy Spirit of the meaning, he told me that he is activating me for the work he has called me.

title: Update On The War
description: On 2 May 2021, I had this briefing from the revelations of the Spirit. Now you know what is truly happening. The devil is desperate to see you lose. That's why he sees him act against any opportunity that seems like hope to you. He wants to bring you out from your resting place and that's why he is making use of any opportunity available to him, so he could draw you out. You know that Alex your brother is just an open access for the devil to tempt you. The devil also listens to your discussion and everything that you say. And also anything that you put your trust in that isn't God. What you must do at this time is to operate from the Spirit. Listen to your heart and not your head. Don't respond to any annoying situation in the flesh but respond in the Spirit if you have to otherwise remain still.

title: The Motto of my ministry is:
description:
On 5 April 2021, The Motto of my ministry is:
Awakening the sluggard and empowering the diligent. I've called you for these people you're trying to runaway from.

This was the reply I got from the Lord after I asked him of where I will be living after I'm married.

title: On 6 February 2021, while waking up this morning I heard my spirit singing this song.
description:
Coming to take of me

Oh lord my life is porous

John 14:3

title: The Cost for Obedience
description:
On 24 December 2020, I was just in the presence of the Lord asking him for help and wondering why I should be in this state. It was the day before Christmas and there wasn't anything in my pocket, not even a kobo.

I've given to people as instructed by Him, made sacrifices, kept My vow and lived a holy life. Yet I'm financially not ok at all, even after series of visions He has told me regarding finances. I asked Him where I'm disobeying him that I've been in this condition. He said it's the cost for obeying Him.

Immediately my mind flashed back to 7 April 2020 with prophet Godwin who told Me that God is going to require a sacrifice from Me to rise to financial power level. Of course, obedience being better than Sacrifice crossed My Mind too (1 Sam 15:22).

He assured me again He will show His goodness whether I like it or not as long as he lives; all I need do is follow Him.

title: God's Family
description:
On 8 January 2021, I was in the secret place, and I kept asking the Lord why he puts up with man so much when what we bring him on a daily basis is trouble? New King James Version Psalm 8:4-8 What is man that You are mindful of him, And the son of man that You visit him? For You have made him a little lower than the angels, And You have crowned him with glory and honor. You have made him to have dominion over the works of Your hands; You have put all things under his feet, All sheep and oxen— Even the beasts of the field, The birds of the air, And the fish of the sea That pass through the paths of the seas.

I quoted this scripture to him and I told him to see that the question was never answered. After deliberating with him for some moments, he told me that he created man differently with the purpose of family in mind. That man is his family that's why he has to go through a lot and also tolerate a lot from them.

title: Filing in The Cases
description:
On 7 January 2021, I was angry in the spirit to speak curses over Zion for mistreating Glory. I didn't know how to proceed, but I had a few scriptures that backs me up.

With that I prayed and declared some curses on him, but I knew something wasn't right about this, Zion is a citizen of God's kingdom and by me cursing him I'm violating the word of God. I couldn't find the proper ground to walk through without failing a law.

Later on, I asked for forgiveness from the lord and repented because I knew I shouldn't curse or judge anyone. After the Holy Spirit counselled me that I was using the wrong approach to resolve this matter. I asked, how then can I resolve this matter? He said to me, "Let me do the judgment, just file in the case.".

After this word of the lord that came to me, I was further led to do some research which led to a teaching by a man of God named Dr. Francis Myles.

title: Crusades or Parties
description: On 26 December 2020, on the morning briefing I had with the Lord, he shared his thoughts to me regarding parties and the pubs. He told me that party places are just a mockery of crusade grounds. He gave me their similarities which is actually why they are opposite. In a crusade you have a man of God preaching, in party you have a man full of devil performing. The people in the crusade ground are theirs because of their hunger for God, whereas the ones in the party are theirs because of their relationship with the god of the flesh and of this world. In crusades, you worship God whereas in parties you dance with devils. At the end of a crusade you go home with healing, deliverance, a touch from heaven, and an impartation. However, before a party comes to an end you go home with sickness, demonic oppression and imprisonment, a touch from hell, and a demon possession. You don't goto a party ground to look for God just as you don't goto a crusade ground to look for the devil. Everyone and everything has a place they could be found. This is what people don't know about parties and crusades.

title: Working Through Me
description:
On 9 October 2020, the Lord told me that he is working through me. Suddenly, that word didn't mean the same thing to me anymore. Eph 3:20, Mark 16:20
It meant that he is working out my future through me now. He does that by the instructions and information he gives to me and the workings that follows suit.
The Lord is working me out through me.

title: How to get the passport
description:
On 30 May 2020, on asking the lord for how I would obtain the passport, he gave me this answer.

I don't want you to touch your savings. I'm teaching you somethings with it. I will cause the finances to come so we can make a physical passport for you.

title: Partners not Slave
description: On 2 December 2020, The Lord said to me to think of my ministry as something of ours and not just me being an obedient slave doing what the master is saying. He said this because I wasn't participating as an equal partner but like a servant. But he is reminding me that the Holy Spirit in me is a helper not the one who runs the show.

title: Abundance in his Presence
description: On 23 April 2020, while I was on the floor, Jesus started telling me again about his presence. He said that there are no dead or unproductive things in his presence. He made me understand that because of the light emanating from him, anything that comes close grow. He reminded me of Aaron's rod that was dead budding in God's presence. That was cut out of a branch of tree and now dead. He told me that in his presence there is always provision. Like in the tabernacle of worship Moses built. There was always bread, heavenly manna, oil and fire burning. That there was no way I could be in his presence and lack.

title: The Course Correction
description: On 13 November 2020, as I spent time in the Lord's presence he told me something about me. He said that I should not base my walk with him by another man's experiences. He said that the finances he is bringing to me will be routed by his hands and not by my hands. That he wants to wear my hands like a cloth. He told me that I should not even look up to a job for this assignment. That he is going to raise me up with zero dependency on jobs. That he is getting my attention off from jobs to him, but I'm fighting against him by insisting on the opposite direction. He told me to repent and continue repenting until every idol of depending on a Job is destroyed in me. He also said that there is no devil anywhere withholding his finances that are redirecting my attention to himself.

title: The Apostolic Mandate
description:
On 14 August 2020, the Lord Jesus visited me and told me bunch of hard to digest stuffs. Not physical appearance, but in the spirit.

First I discerned that he is truly kingdom orientated, because that always seems to come first whenever he talks with me. He is really a strong person and has this command in him, he tells you the truth and wait for you to get it.

He told me that I have an apostolic call, but I've told him that I really don't want to be an apostle. He wasted no time in reminding me of Eccl 6:10 NLT. He told me that there is nothing I could do or say that can change the truth about my destiny.

title: Next Phase Brutality
description:
On 23 July 2020, the lord told me that he isn't done building me. He told me that this next phase will see me become a brutal person in the spirit.

That the walk in the spirit will be intensified, that I'll be having angelic visitation regularly. That nothing can make me fail. That I should continue in his presence. That I'm not suffering but qualifying for the responsibilities he has for me in his agenda.

That I should culture my relationship with my family as I did with the Johns. 

That I should remove my mind from marriage for now and focus on my building.

He also told me that I take things from every man of God I listen to. That part of their graces are copied to me.

title: Waiting on The Lord
description:
On 22 August 2020, I was getting worn out in my patience waiting, then the lord spoke to me from Hos 6:3 and Ish 8:17.

He asked me these questions:
Are people idle when they tell you to wait for them? I answered no. 

Then why do you think I'm seeing you waiting on me and I remain idle?

He asked me, don't you know that their are people and events involved in bringing about the result you seek?

He told me that he is currently working on those people and events so they will happen and profit me. 

He went on telling me that people only think that he does things in a fast way, that they don't also know he does things in a slow way as well. He reminded me of the scripture in Ps 90:4, 2 Pet 3:8.

He says that he does things in singles and batches as well, that people don't consider all these variables and they run out of patience too quickly. 

He said that when I pray in the Spirit, part of the prayers licenses him to work on these people and events. 

He told me to observe the life of David and his becoming of the king of Israel. He asked me, did you see how many people and events were involved? 

It became clear to me after these counseling that the lord does not take pleasure in denying me of my requests, some answers just takes time.

title: Follow Their Faith
description:
On 3 November 2020, while praying in the Spirit, after asking God to teach me his word following Ps 119. He showed me Heb 13:7 and it read in the AMPC version.

Hebrews 13:7:
Remember your leaders and superiors in authority [for it was they] who brought to you the Word of God. Observe attentively and consider their manner of living (the outcome of their well-spent lives) and imitate their faith (their conviction that God exists and is the Creator and Ruler of all things, the Provider and Bestower of eternal salvation through Christ, and their leaning of the entire human personality on God in absolute trust and confidence in His power, wisdom, and goodness).

The lord is telling me to draw faith from the walk of those who are ahead of me and be completely convinced that he will not fail me. And this is the best pictorial communication I've had with God so far, for I saw the scriptural reference written in my spirit.

title: Rattled Theology Summary of April 13, 2020 Intimacy Time with Jesus.
description: He said I will grow into the things he has given me, that includes MSI, anointing, and the rest. He said that he trust me, that a relationship can only work if their is trust. He shattered my false beliefs about some subjects, and gave me new perspectives. He said that I should spend more time with him than I spend with any other minister. He assured me that every good things I'm seeing coming my way is his plan for me. He told me that the awareness of his presence is the cause of change.

title: Delighting in The Lord
description:
On 29 September 2020, while praying in Spirit and meditating Ps 37:1-7, I became curious to know the meaning of delighting in the Lord to grant me the desires of my heart, so I asked the Lord. 

The Lord told me that this portion of the scripture is a typeset of Matt 6:25-34. He told me that to delight in the Lord (Ps 37:4) is to seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness (Matt 6:33).

The people that Ps 37:4 was given to firsthand were in a similar condition with the people Matt 6:33.

Ps 37 was spoken by King David, Matt 6:33 was spoken by King Jesus.

title: The Buzzing Hands
description: On 12 September 2020, Today while spending time in worship and prayers to God, the Holy Spirit did something new to me. My two palms were just vibrating for almost an hour.

title: The Gospel
description: On 7 September 2020, the Lord said this to me: 'son, spread the knowledge of me and teach people my ways'. The knowledge about God is the Gospel, and that's also my name! Mark 16:18

title: The Mordecai Blessings
description: On 6 September 2020, while praying the Holy Spirit took over and start speaking through me. He was challenging my enemies and prophesying the Mordecai blessings on me. He prophesied the Herman curses on my enemies.

title: A Pre-arranged World
description: On 1 September 2020, while I was praying the lord told me that everything has been pre-arranged. That if I could be obedient to go where he is pointing to me and do what he is telling me to do then the blessings he arranged for me will automatically fall into my basket.

title: The Mystery of Oneness
description:
On 3 September 2020, The lord gave me this picture to help me understand oneness both with the father and with him:

A fish lives in water, and there's water inside of it. It lives and dwells and have its being in that water. The water is its source, and can't do nothing without that water.

Its the same with us and Jesus, and also Jesus and the father, the Holy Spirit and the father. God is the water and we're like the fishes. 
The fish can't act against the water; it will be stupid and useless of it to kick against its prick. John 14:10,11,17,20

title: Productive Son
description: On 3 September 2020, The lord told me this when I felt like I'm not seeking after the kingdom enough, even though that's the only thing I do in my life: "You're one of the most productive sons I have" says the Father. He reminded me that I've only walked with him for less than 3yrs.

title: Obedience with the Holy Spirit
description: On 11 August 2020, the father told me that I should just walk in Obedience with him and I will be fine. He said that its not by performance but by his Spirit. He said that the secret to obeying him more is to be closer to the Holy Spirit.

title: Drunk In The Spirit
description: On 10 August 2020, I had another hit in the spirit. I was drunk in the spirit again and was laughing, speaking in tongs, and speaking from the Holy Spirit all at the same time for more than an hour. This was after the lord gave me a warning dream of the devil desiring to sift me like a wheat.

title: Done It To God
description: On 1 August 2020, the lord spoke to my heart of this word "Ebarious Contus" I knew he was talking about the recipe he gave me. I asked him if he enjoyed it, and he said yes. I told him that he didn't even have a taste of it, how can he enjoy it? He told me that because he is everywhere and in us, that he experienced it and it was lovely. And that's why when we do anything good for anyone we've done it to Him.

title: Being Patient
description: On 10 August 2020, the lord told me to be patient with Glory, that I should just be friends with her, and only help when I'm asked. He said I should pursue the kingdom and the right woman will join me. And he also want me to get his thoughts for anything I want to do.

title: Briefing From The Holy Spirit On GoShop Initiation and Evangelism Ministry Schedule
description: On 3 August 2020, the Holy Spirit briefed me that I'll immediately commence GoShop in my house every Thursdays. He told me to invite people around me and also tell my siblings. He told me to use the money I've been given to start the work. He told me that Saturdays are my evangelism with salvation ministry and the other days are to be used for continuing the book writing. He told me that chairs can be taken from above father. He told me that he is bringing more resources especially financial resources.

title: Music In Me
description: On July 7 2020, the Lord gave me a new music in my heart as I woke up. While I was humming the song the Lord told me that he has put music inside of me. That explains why I see guitar 🎸 and a mic 🎤 periodically.

title: His Presence
description: On 3 July 2020, the Lord Jesus told me during our intimacy session that I should relax in his presence.

title: The Hidden Way
description: On 16 June 2020, while meditating on prov 4:7, Jesus told me that he is the hidden way, the not so popular way to attain true success. He told me that even his people don't know him. That they take his words lightly. He told me that the truth is valuable, so its not always kept open. That the truth is revealed to those who search. The truth reveals the way to you. Truth is revealed meaning, it was sealed. You need someone to reveal the truth to you, but this happens only when you search.

title: Passion Made Simple
description: On 9 June 2020, while meditating on God's word I was asked the question "what is the passion of the creator of canva?" I answered to make graphic design simple and accessible to everyone. And then I was asked about my passion, I answered 'to have many grow in the knowledge of God'.

title: The Truth About A Branch
description:
On 28 April 2020, Jesus and I had the following conversation, sequel to John 15:

As a branch what should you be praying for? 
1. To remain fixed to the tree.
2. To get more nutrients.
3. To bear fruits and more on time.
4. To blossom with leafs and flowers.
5. To be immune to diese.
6. To be pruned.
7. For other branches to receive the same.
8. For more branches to be grafted to the tree.

As a branch what should you be doing? 
I should be remaining in you and your words living powerfully within me. He further directed my attention to the branch structure and formation. He got me to see that each branch is different from the others. He told me that the structural formation of branch determines the number of the fruits, leafs, and flowers they bear. 

He also revealed the mystery of dancing, worship, and praise to me. He showed me a tree dancing as the wind steadily blows on it. He told me that this was the kind of dance that moves God, a dance of the Spirit. When a tree dances, what moves it is the wind not itself. For true worshipers must worship God in Spirit and in Truth. And when a tree dances by the power of the wind, dead branches, ripe leafs, rotten fruits falls off. Its the same for us, anything taking up nutrients and not producing in our lives are discarded.

title: Broods of Vipers
description: On 5 June 2020, when I was meditating on John 8, the lord Jesus revealed to me that anyone that hates his message is a child of the evil one. That anyone that loves him will love to hear and listen to him. He then went on to show me more about Adeola, a girl I met for a short time. She always hate it when I bring the topic of God. The lord told me that she is an example of a satanic agent. She was sent to hinder me from growing. That anyone that does not carry his nature belongs to the evil one.

title: Supernatural Speed for Accomplishment
description: On 2 June 2020, the lord told me that he is bringing supernatural speed for me to further the works that he has given me. It became clear to me that by my strength, I can only do one job per time, and not even at the best. I told the lord about it and he said he is bringing supernatural speed for me to accomplish them faster.

title: Father Proud of Me
description: On 15 May 2020, while I was writing the book titled "unveiling the tree of life", I was throwing in a lot of scriptures and deriving proofs. I thought to myself that my mentor will be really proud of me. Father took note of this and told me he is proud of me. He further said I've no idea how much he's proud, as it's God telling him so.

title: Sit At My Right Hand
description:
On 7 May 2020, for some reason I was led to goto my church. I worshiped God on the way and continue worshipping him even after I got there. I prayed a little, laid on the alter and said things to the Father.

On finishing, I told him to say something to me, in my mind I saw him on his throne, he said to me "son, sit at my right hand until I makes your enemies your footstool." I asked, isn't that Jesus's place and what you told him? He told me that I'm part of Jesus, and said "whatever he does for Jesus, he also do for us."

title: Strategy for Prosperity
description: On 23 April 2020, Jesus told me that anyone who wants to prosper in life without compromising his soul must eat enough of the Word, drink enough of the Spirit, and offer enough needful service.

title: The Cleansing Agent
description: On the 27 April 2020, while meditating on the word, Jesus told me that the Word is a cleansing agent that restores one to an original version. That I came loaded with the Word and Spirit as the signature from my creator. The Word was written in my heart and the Spirit installed within me, but I was stained up. So whenever the Word gets into my heart again, it purifies and takes me back to my original state before Adam fell. Once the seed of the Word is sown in your heart it will continue growing to maturity. Even if it takes an eternity, says Jesus. The Spirit fertilizes the Word to cause life. The Spirit and the Word are equally vital for the growth of any life.

title: The Calling of a Great Man
description: On the 26 April 2020, God has been telling me more about my destiny. He told me that I'm a great man. He told me that part of my destiny is to be a resource supplier. He's made me understand that I’m to help many people stand in their destiny. He’s steadily telling me that he fashioned me into being this way with financial resources so as not only can I assist his projects but also fund them on the earth. His continuous guidance has shifted my paradigm towards becoming great, and he's instructed me about getting documentary materials set for inspiration purposes; moreover, I'm receiving ideas to create wealth through various means while ensuring success in women-related endeavors.

title: Warning about Women on Great Destiny Journey
description: On 25 April 2020, Jesus told me that if one is marked for greatness, his greatest mistake will be to marry the wrong woman. That the enemy will try to give him a woman that will torment and control him, aborting his destiny. He told me that the eyes of a man with great destiny always behold a beautiful woman. But only the lord can give him a true woman. He also want me to check out all he has said in the scriptures about women.

title: Life Giver To A Dying World
description: On 23 April 2020, while I was studying Luke 9, Jesus told me that the earth was already dead before he came to give it life. That I was already dead before he came to give me life. That was why he keeps giving life to other areas of my life to this day, and will continue doing so.

title: Lack of Faith annoys Jesus
description: On 23 April 2020, while I was studying Luke 9, Jesus told me that one thing that upsets him is faithlessness. That was why he always rebuke his disciples when they don't show faith.

title: Answered Prayer
description: On 23 April 2020, while I was praying in the spirit I had an huge assurance in my heart that my prayers has been answered. By faith one knows that his prayer has been answered but this was more than that. It was like God whispering to my heart that my prayers has been answered. So I started praying for others that the lord was bringing to my heart.

title: Encouraging words from God - Summary of April 15, 2020 intimacy Time with Jesus.
description:
1. Continue to think good thought. Ponder on the things God has told you. Contemplate on them, let those thoughts fill your heart.
2. The animations along with other pictures are to be compiled in a presentation. This is what you'll use for teaching.
3. You grow in prosperity in the proportion of your soul.
4. I was guaranteed that there was no way I was gonna fail. God reminded me that everything has been done for my favor.
5. He told me that current situations are temporary and I was definitely growing toward his promises for my life.

title: Light of The World
description: On 31 August 2019, I had this vision of the Lord, which is very significant to my destiny. It was the third day of my twenty one days fasting when the Lord visited me in a vision. Laying on a GIT chair keeping calm to see what the Lord will show me, I saw myself in a gardened environment that has a lot of trees in it. It was like a forest but was well taken care of and looked beautiful and perfect. From where I was standing, there were trees on the left and right, with a path in front of me. While observing this amazing environment, I saw an intense bright white light coming from the end of the path in front of me. The light was so bright that it overshadowed the sun but produced no heat like the sun; its brilliance captivated my gaze as it got closer to me and revealed itself to be a lamp held by Jesus himself.

title: Blue Light Particles
description: On 21 September 2020, in my vision, I was taking to a location where an old man was lying on a mat dried and weakened by an illness. The angel by my side instructed me to stretch my hand towards him and pray for his healing. He told me that power will flow through my hands to heal the man. As I did, I saw blue particles of light flowing from my hands and released to that man.

title: Angelic Assistants Encountered on Bed
description: On 21 July 2020, I saw in the spirit two angels with white robes at two edges of my bed, close to the walls. The first was with a treasure chest in his hands. I asked him what he is here for, he opened the box and emptied its gold coins inside of me. I saw the second angel at the other side of my bed; this one had an ephod on his head with a thick long scroll on his hands. I asked him the same question and he opened the lengthy scroll to me and started scanning through it.

title: Visions and Events of April 13, 2021
description:
On 13 April 2021, I saw the following visions within the early hours of the morning. 

I saw a price table for content marketing tasks that pays at the range of $200 and above.

I saw Adeola trying to seduce me in my dreams. She was dressed in a short gown, stack naked with no underwear and dancing seductively showing me everything to get my attention. I went straight to her and told her that I don't want to ever see her again and then she left disappointed and angry.

I saw myself withdrawing quite a lot of cash such that the ATM had troubles dispensing it all at once.

I saw myself chasing and stoning a green snake in my compound, but it barely escaped me. I then saw a dead tall tree on our boundary that needed to be cut down for firewood.

title: The Delilah Tests
description:
On 22 September 2020, in my vision, I was living in a large room and there were many distractions, specifically from women. I saw me studying my materials on my bed, and in front of me was a Waldrop. While I was there I saw beautiful woman loitering about. They all look like African Americans with really attractive specs. They walked to and fro in the room with faces polished with makeups.

Some of them were quarrelsome, some seductive, some with boyfriends, some prostitutes and fornicators but they all had something in common which is, they were all in a mission to distract me. The last beautiful young woman I saw walked into the room, she came over to my direction and accessed the Waldrop. Next she started undressing, I had to run out of there to save myself from seeing something that will tempt me to sin. 1 Cor 6:18

This happened before or after I had moved to a foreign land because the scene was all showing that I was due for my travel, my box was already packed and the travel was inevitable.

title: Sovereign Wealth Appointment
description:
On 13 July 2020, I saw Jesus standing by a door of an open tomb, with the stone by his right hand. The surrounding looked like a gardened forest. Jesus had long dark hair with a simple white robe. John 19:41
I asked him this question, "Lord, is that you?", I had an affirmation on his face. John 21:12
Then I asked him for what he has for me, we levitated to the cloud and he laid two fingers on my both palms while I knelt down. It was like a king appointing someone for a position. Next he placed a big gold coin on my left palm. The gold coin had some symbols I've not seen before. Matt 25:15 TPT

title: Visions and Experiences on February 2, 2021 - March 2, 2021
description:
On 2 February 2021, I saw the following visions:
I saw me joined an online job platform. Jobs are broken down into tasks and shared among the team. Example, to write a function that performs a certain action. But before I could start, the client withdrew it saying all manner of rubbish that I wasn't serious with the job, meanwhile it wasn't even up to 2hr since I was given the job, she accused me before my 24hr was over. It was a really simple task that paid $30 dollar. Another task still from this online community with a price tag of 30-40$ to implement was slated for me to perform and also a third task. It was relatively simple but I was trying to understand how things are done their because it was my first day.

On 2 March 2021, I was added to a slack channel as a freelancer for cometChat after they saw my post on Dev.to.
I saw me in uniform along with a kid in county high school about to be punished by the principal for coming late even though I told him the reason was because we were helping a teacher. He was angry that a supervisor came and we weren't available, he was desirous of giving us some lashes of the Cain because others were being flogged but we were then freely dismissed.

I saw a crazy Japanese man doing some magic in a sewing shop I visited, and I was quite impressed.
I saw me being very careful of another beautiful lady because I had already chosen glory. This lady was "Confidence Tuesday" in this dream, I saw that she and I were getting too close and I was becoming alerted of my commitment with glory.

title: The Four Horns
description:
On 4 January 2021, while praying in the Spirit I saw in a vision four huge dark figures with a yellow colored python eyes. They look like giants and completely dark in appearance, the four of them are like a team working together with a little variations in their heights. They also had some dark colored crowns on their heads.

They look dead evil, and they were looking at me because there was no one else there but me, I saw their eyes gazing towards my direction. And now, I know that these are the controlling powers in my community working against me; they're not some little demons but principalities themselves. I asked the Lord about this and he pointed Zech 1:18-21 to me. Oh, He also told me that He is going to help Me defeat them because He is building up for it.

Then I raised my eyes and looked, and there were four horns. And I said to the angel who talked with me, 'What are these?' So he answered me, 'These are the horns that have scattered Judah, Israel, and Jerusalem.' Then The Lord showed Me four craftsmen. And I asked them what they came for? They told me: These are the horns that scattered Judah so that no one could lift up his head; but the craftsmen were coming to terrify Them in order to cast out the horns of nations who lifted their horn against land of Judah, and scatter it.

I asked The Lord about Their roles. He said they include principalities of poverty which keep people poor in my community, sexual immorality, untimely death, idolatry. I also ask Him why didn't he tell me this earlier? And the answer was: 'You needed to start battle from within then to outside.' That ones who are taken care already and He is expanding Me for My family lineage as well as Community.

In other words The Lord said that how can one take Care of a principality if One hasn't Taken Care Personal Devils or wrong thinking.

title: Generating Finance Like Coins
description:
On 18 March 2021, I saw Kathy and Kevin Zadai being interviewed on ISN and they were talking about finances. 

Kevin said one could generate finances by praying in the spirit. 
Kathy took up the matter and said that she could stays at home and generate money like a coin by praying in the spirit. As she was saying this I saw her on her knees praying in the spirit in her clean and rich looking living room and I saw what looked like coins in a container by the side of the room. 

Here is what the Holy Spirit said to me, "this is a revelation on finances that God is bringing to you, and as the days progresses, you will get to understand how to do what Kevin and Kathy Zadai were saying."

I saw me working from home as a remote software Developer. I saw that video calling and online platforms became my modus operandi.

She will spoil you!" I knew that it wasn't the Lord speaking through her but either the flesh or from another spirit. She was speaking from a place of Jealousy. I've canceled this event from coming to pass though.

I saw Peter in my dreams handling food, he gave me pawpaw; he's hasn't changed a bit, still very glued to food.

title: The Golden Armored Angel

As I continued praying I saw in the spirit a warrior angel with a golden Armored attire standing close to my bed. His armor was designed in an unusual way with a white cape behind him. At his shoulder was a golden shoulder guard that protruded like wings. It was the first thing that caught my attention. This is the first time I've seen a warrior angel. While he stood there looking at me, their was this energy that caused me to pray in an uncommon way. I believe that angel has been sent from the Lord to carryout warfare in my life, family, and pathways. After what seems to be ten minutes of energized prayers, my tempo dropped to normal and I could no more see him.

title: Ending Ospack Visitation
description: On 22 November 2020, In my dream, the devil sent some Ospack men who then took on the shape of children to come and pick my brother up. When they came, Alex wasn't around. For the benefit of doubt I opened my house so that could see but they went far to dare me by saying that they want to stay inside with me and wait for what knows when Alex comes home. I got angry in spirit and entered into authority. I asked for their leader and told them to gather in front of me. I explained to them that I teach kids like you lessons in school, and I've taught you the truth still you wanted to joke with me. I said they knew what's going on because Alex did something wrong but they've gone too far testing my patience so they're here not for what he done or why he's there it's just cause of me which is a lie that I'm lying about myself as well if that's true then there's no reason them being around at all and I've told you the truth still they want to play with me. I went full scripture on them, 'It is written touch not my anointed and do my prophet no harm.' Once said it was going into next word by declaring curses upon them but as soon as that happened then they're running away begging for mercy like they've never done before which I'm giving because they know what I've told you. As the get to Officer's gate I come out there shouting at them, 'this should be last time see me again else you're dead' and all of a sudden run off with no one stopping or even trying stop us as if they're scared that we're going somewhere dangerous like hell itself but I'm not telling where we are headed. They were up to ten children which is why I can tell you they can't have come from this world because there was too many for them to be able just a few people and then suddenly in the physical, there's no road as far away they're walking on it's swamp.

title: Vision of Lawlessness Followed by Ospack Departure
description: Still in same vision I saw a lot lawless boys shooting guns like they are bringing someone from mortuary ridding on road close to my house with speed. In physical, there's no such roads but swamp where they're walking through and then called family telling them see how these people can't use our own road for their nonsense instead made one in bushes which is why we don't have any cars driving there at all because it's not even a paved way that they can drive on so that's what I told my wife. And after the day was over, while I'm just thinking about God and everything he's been doing through me like taking me places I've never seen before how far i've gone in walking with him as well then suddenly see spirit realm manifesting into physical which is amazing.

title: The Attack On The Techs
description:
On 17 January 2021, I saw the following visions:
I was in Nworieubi and saw good growth in the church population; their was even a larger hall and a new alter minister. But the church had a terrible experience with their technical unit. They lost a whole service and about to lose second service because of the techs. TV, amps, decoder, including the fans all went bad. I had to pull my shirt off to stay cool in the church.

I tried to fix the TV but everywhere was so dark I couldn't find the fault. I asked for a torch but no body seems to have one. Meanwhile, in the second service the amp went bad and pastor tried working on it but couldn't find the fault. Mummy and Pastor were just confused and tired of the whole situation without knowing what to do. People had to go home without the word of God that Sunday and I was so mad about the circumstance.

I didn't see any technical unit member in this dream. And their was a new alter minister who is a woman, and mummy introduced her to me telling me that she is going to fly high in her life and position. That I should get to meet her which I did.

title: Visions and Encounters on January 16, 2021

title: Deregulation
description:
On 11 June 2021, I heard the Lord spoke this word to me: Deregulation. Deregulation means the removal or reduction of laws or other demands of governmental control. Deregulation often takes the form of eliminating a regulation entirely or altering an existing regulation to reduce its impact.

From this statement, I'm discerning that the Lord is trusting me more and has granted me more freedom to grow and be established in the order of Ps 32:8-9 TPT. This means promotion, elevation, expansion, more responsibilities, power, authority, resources, and supports.

:caveat (an explanation or warning that should be remembered when you are doing or thinking about something)
a explanation or warning enjoining one from certain acts or practices a caveat against unfair practices
a modifying detail to be considered when evaluating, interpreting, or doing something

title: Wealth Custodian - On 10 November 2020, the Lord spoke to my heart as I stepped out of my bed, 'You're a custodian of wealth'. We went straight to research and I found out that the term custodian was found three times in the book of Esther. The term was associated with Hegia who was the custodian of women for king Ahasuerus (Est 2:3,8,15). Meriam Webster dictionary defined custodian as 'one that guards and protects or maintains; especially one entrusted with guarding and keeping property or records or custody or guardianship of prisoners or inmates'. Shebna and Eliakim had this sort of position from Ish 22. Christ taught a lot concerning stewardship, scriptural references below speak of financial stewardship (Matt 25:14-29, Luke 16:11). I think, this is another confirmation of my appointment from Jesus on the position of kingdom treasure.
