title: The Tempter Visitation
description:
On 18 March 2021, a time in my life where I was having financial delays and I have been assigned a task by the comet chat team. I didn't have a dime to move the project to completion, it has only been by the provisional arm of El Shaddai that I've been able to progress the Job towards completion.

Meanwhile, knowledge and experience have thought me that the right time that Satan comes to test you is when you're at your down time.
On this occasion, I've believed God so much that he will fulfill what he promised me specifically about giving me a job that will put a fortune in my hand. And that word I've treasured in my heart, being fully persuaded about what the Lord had said he will do for me.

Satan showed up this afternoon and tried to distort that word which God had given me and this was his point. "God will never give you a job that will take you away from him. He is going to give you one small job so that you can serve him. And it will take awhile before you get to that top.".

Regardless of how innocent that information looks, it wasn't what the Lord had told me. If I should believe Satan's words over God's, my expectations will change and what I will receive at the end will be disappointing compared to what God told me. 

Additionally, with the word of God living mightily in my heart I understood that Love is not self seeking. So Satan's word interpolation that God will not give me what he has promised me failed because it didn't agree with the word of God.

Again, Jesus said it multiple times that if we ask God in his name for what we want it will be done. Also, the bible teaches that God is more than able to do abundantly above that which we ask or think. And again, Jesus said that when we pray we should believe that what we've prayed for is done and it shall be ours.

Thirdly, I saw that the scripture said that if I delight in the Lord he will give me the desires of my heart. 

Lastly, I reasoned that if God will allow the unbelievers to have well-paying jobs then is it me his beloved that he will deny. The scriptures says that God will not deny his lovers any good thing.

I saw that God is not an insecure God that he will fear that giving me a financial power such as $100k per year will bring me down. Instead, he will train and give me the grace to carry that power. 

After these thoughts, I confronted the tempter with my proofs and all of a sudden he left town.

Indeed the word of God is sharper than any two edged sword dividing between soul and spirit. Because of God's word I knew who was speaking to me and he wasn't the Lord but the adversary. 

I've held on to the words which the Lord has given me and I see no reason why the Lord will withhold any good thing from me.

I've passed my test and the tempter has lost out again, I know that the Lord will give me more than I'm asking or thinking. He loves me so much and finds me irresistible. Together we're going to change the world for good.

title: Availeth Much - James 5:16b KJV and Prov 23:18 KJV
description: On 22 March 2021, This morning while praying fervently for the hand of God to touch my left testicle and restore it to normal, I asked the Lord for what he is saying concerning the issue and he gave me this word. The effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much. James 5:16b KJV And also this word bubble forth from my spirit. For surely there is an end; and thine expectation shall not be cut off. Prov 23:18 KJV Clearly, these texts guarantees me that the Lord has heard my prayers and he is going to recreate my left testicle.

title: Meaning of the name Chikamso
description:
On 20 December 2020, I kept hearing the name called "Chikamso" but I didn't understand the meaning yet. I asked my siblings if they know someone by that name, they said no.

Later in the evening being led to make some dangerous declarations I heard that name again. So I asked the Lord for who he was talking about, he said its not about him but the meaning behind the name.

Then I checked it out online and it's an Igbo name that means: "I am following God". Immediately I understood that God is saying I'm doing well following Him.

title: Its Gonna Be Ok
description:
On ,23 December 2020, while waking an hour late to do my morning prayers. I was not ok that I'm battling to keep my schedule like I used to do.

Immediately I went out to ease myself, I heard this phrases which was an old song I would not like to listen on a normal day. It sings,...

title: Betrothed
description: On 3 January 2021, while practicing my song to the Lord, I was thinking about a dream I saw me introducing glory to my aunt. While thinking about it the word of the lord came to me, "betrothed". When I checked it out from the dictionary it means a person to whom someone is engaged to be married. It was a term I've read in the old testament with no deep understanding neither have I used it in my conversations, yet, the Holy Spirit spoke that word to my heart while I was thinking about glory. From this word of the Lord, Its clear that glory will be engaged to me in a short time to come and the Lord is also confirming her as my wife.

title: Azhi-Le-Unnu-Uka - Encouraging Word and Life Change Confirmation
description: On 22 January 2021, while praying in the Spirit and meditating on the scripture, the Lord spoke this word into my heart, Azhi-Le-Unnu-Uka. This is an encouraging word Ekpeye often used as name for people. It means that what's to come is greater or what's ahead of you is better. This is another confirmation from God about something huge He is bringing into your life which will change it and it's near.

title: Anointed For Wonders
description:
On 7 March 2021, The Lord gave me these words during the service after I had asked him for a word that will make me a wonder to my world. Psalm 45:7 AMPC You love righteousness, uprightness, and right standing with God and hate wickedness; therefore God, Your God, has anointed You with the oil of gladness above Your fellows.

And this is what that anointing will produce. Psalm 23:5-6 AMPC You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies. You anoint my head with oil; my [brimming] cup runs over. Surely or only goodness, mercy, and unfailing love shall follow me all the days of my life, and through the length of my days the house of the Lord [and His presence] shall be my dwelling place.

The Holy Spirit is pouring out his oil on me and he is saying, just like he filled up all the vessels the widow of Zarephat brought to Elijah, he will also fill up every area of my life I bring to him.  These words I said by the Spirit.

title: Opulence
description:
On 8 March 2021, I heard the Spirit whisper to me the word opulence and when I checked it out, it means:

: wealth,
affluence 
: abundance,
profusion
Still I know and I'm convinced that the Holy Spirit is speaking the will of the Father to me, he is literally reading the book of my destiny to me and strengthening me with that confidence. 

Their is no day I don't see money in my spirit, I see bunch of money, different types of denominations, and currencies.

I see coins, paper currencies and cryptos in QR codes.

title: The Multi Breasted One
description:
On 12 March 2021, While watching, praying, and meditating on the word in the early hours of the morning, the word of the Lord visited me and said the phrase: 'The Multi Breasted One'. I've only heard this phrase once from Apostle Michael Orakpo once, but never knew the meaning, though he claimed that it meant El Shaddai. I knew El Shaddai was a translation of God Almighty in the bible; however, there is another meaning to the word Shaddai with a different flavor.

In my quest to understand the meaning of the word El Shaddai and why the Holy Spirit will whisper this phrase to me, I've found an article from a blog very useful. (Links below)
e Another name that can be translated as 'God' is 'El,' which can also denote various aspects of God’s character.

Another Hebrew term similar to Shaddai—and believed by many to have derived—is 'shad,' meaning ‘breast.’ This refers to the idea: "This refers to God completely nourishing, satisfying, and supplying His people with all their needs as a mother would her child." (Matt 23:37)

Another interpretation describes shaddai in this manner:
"Some interpret Shaddai as 'sufficient,' meaning that He is the ‘All-sufficient One.’ Either of these interpretations—mighty or sufficient—is meaningful to me because Almighty God, who alone can meet any need. His power and provision are beyond measure; with great compassion, he sustains us.

These insights come from Gen 17:1 when Abraham was introduced by God as El Shaddai while in desperate need of an offspring. When the Spirit Of God said 'The Multi Breasted One' to me during a time I needed spiritual lifting and provision for my life, He confirmed His covenant with us.

When asked what this meant specifically—God is confirming his commitment to see you being lifted and provided until you overflow.' It was akin to God's introduction as El Shaddai in the order of Abraham (Gen 17:1), where God promised a son through an everlasting bond. Links for further study:
https://blogs.blueletterbible.org/blb/2012/06/28/the-names-of-god-el-shaddai/

https://www.biblestudytools.com/bible-study/topical-studies/what-is-the-meaning-of-the-name-shaddai.html

title: The Lord never begins something unless he knows that he will win.
description: On 23 March 2021, my spirit spoke these words when I was thinking about the challenges I've faced just this month about my finances regardless of the opportunity the Lord had just opened for me. Are there any challenges in the process? Definitely, but the end justifies the means. That's I'll rejoice at the end.

title: Congenital Testicle Concern
description:
On 24 March 2021, while being concerned about the Lord's response about my left testicle because I needed a recreative miracle, he said the same thing to me as before, "wait". Honestly I wasn't satisfied about the answer and I needed some insight or instruction on what to do.

While walking down to GTC for my evening meet up with the students, I heard the word of the Lord say to me "congenital", I had no idea what that word meant or if I've ever heard it. 

When I checked out the meaning from the dictionary, I found out that it meant the following.

a : existing since or at; dating from birth
b : constituting an essential characteristic, inherent.
c : acquired during development in the uterus and not through heredity. 

With that word I understood the condition of my left ball to be something that has resulted from birth. As far as I can remember, I started observing that my left testicle was different at the age of five or six.

title: Isomeric Whispered by the Spirit
description:
On 13 March 2021, I heard the Spirit whispered the word Isomeric to me after having a sweet discuss with Glory my love. When I checked it out it meant the following from the dictionary.

: the relationship of two or more chemical species that are isomers
:
 the relation of two or more nuclides with the same mass numbers and atomic numbers but different energy states and rates of radioactive decay.

After understanding what the Spirit was saying, I heard him say this again, "You and Glory are Isomers". This means that me and glory are so alike with just a little difference.

title: Sacrilege and Warning Dream
description:
On 9 August 2020, the lord spoke this word to me "sacrilege". I understand from the dictionary that the word means to treat a holy place or object in a way that does not show proper respect. In essence, it is to steal or defile what is of the Lord.

The warning dream I had the next morning made it clearer as I saw that the evil one is trying to sift me by getting me to commit sexual immorality.

title: Courage To Sing
description: On 9 March 2021, I was with glory in my dream then the scene changes to where I was interviewed for a vice president position. Afterwards, I was asked to sing a song in front of a large crowd after everyone has been asked to sing to no avail. I was a little uncomfortable and was going to bail before glory said these words 'can I come in?', she encouraged me to sing. Then I summoned the courage to sing after she had told me a few things. Just as I was about singing the dream came to an end. There were musical instruments all setup for me, all I just need to do was to open my mouth. I was going to sing my song titled 'Doh'.

title: The Words of the Spirit WOSE - Prophecy and Inspiration
description:
On 5 March 2021, On closing the WOSE, Pst. David Ibiyeomie asked us to prophecy into the lives our partner.

After I spoke into the life of the woman that partnered with me she in turn spoke into my life and I could sense the inspiration of the Holy Spirit in her words. She spoke that the Lord will publicise me and my ministry, that the Lord will make me excel in my work and business, that I shall be the head and not the tail, at the top and not the bottom, that I be filled with wisdom, that nothing shall die in my hands, and that my family will prosper. All these words she spoke by the Spirit were so precise and I've never discussed any part of my life with her.

title: Affluence - Holy Spirit's Illumination on Abundance and Wealth
description: On 28 February 2021, after dressing up in my jump suit and heading to church, the Holy Spirit spoke to me the word Affluence. I've heard preachers used that word a lot but I had no understanding of its specific meaning yet until I checked it out afterward; affluence means: abundance of property or wealth (an abundant flow or supply), influx - when referring specifically about supernatural abundance which is what was being taught at church for the Sunday service.

title: Inducted
description:
On 19 February 2021, I heard the word Inducted in my spirit and of course I've not used that word before and have no idea what it meant, so I checked it out in the dictionary and this is what I found. 

: to have (someone) officially begin a new job, position, or government office
:	 to officially make (someone) a member of a group or organization
:	 to enroll (someone) for military training or service
I just sense in the spirit that a new season / position has been opened for me to walk in and I can't wait to understand the description. I told God to confirm it and he used Kevin Zadai and mummy Oluchi to confirm it because they both spoke the word.
Funny enough, I was asking the Holy Spirit for the way forward as I was to go back to my state, meaning that i won't be seeing her for a short time.

title: Inducted - Confirmation and Next Steps
description:
He replied me saying, you're tidying up things here.

This indicates that I'm finishing up things here for a new phase.

title: Inducted - Church Role Announcement
description:
On 21 February 2021, The following day being a Sunday I was given a role as a Homecell leader in my church like they new I'm a teacher and had handled a Homecell before. 

I watched as the word of the was playing out in front of me with no input except to say yes. I was observing the Holy Spirit and angelic activities happening right in front of me.

This was after the lord told me that I've been inducted yesterday.

title: Inducted - Mother's Blessing
description:
On my first teaching at the Homecell, I felt the power of God really strong. The people were blessed and the Homecell host gave this testimony afterward:

Me and my wife has prayed to God a lot concerning a Homecell leader and now he has answered that prayer by sending you.
I was impressed about what the lord has been doing under the hood.

title: Emissary - A person who represents another.
description:
On 25 February 2021, the Spirit whispered to me this word called emissary. I didn't know the meaning of course and this was what I found out from the dictionary.

:a person who is sent on a mission to represent another person or organization
a person designated as the agent of another: representative
a secret agent
I got some encouragement from this word as it tells me that the Lord is still with me, I'm on track, and heavens resources are readily available for me.

title: Already Yours - You don't ask for what's already yours.
description:
On 27 September 2020, The Word of the Lord said to me: You don't ask for what's already yours. You don't pursue what's in your possession already.

Later on while I was watching a teaching, the preacher repeated the same statement: You don't ask for what's already yours.

title: Already Yours - Anointing and Blessings Given.
description:
While I dig deep in my heart to see what I've been asking the Lord to do for me, he told me:
I've already given you the anointing,
I've given you the money,
I've given you Glory,
I've given you the move to Canada.

When I asked him what I should then do, he said, be thankful, believe and call out the blessings. And focus on the chase after my kingdom.

title: Communication In Leadings
description:
On 31 January 2021, in my little time with God I've experienced him speaking to me in many ways. One interesting way he does that is through ordinary people.

Before the 24th of January 2021, I've been noticing a woman who was also attending my church telling me that there is a new branch of our church and I need to start attending that one. At first I thought to myself, I already got duty in HQ where I served.

title: Acumen in spirit
description:
On 13 January 2021, I heard the word acumen in my spirit, again another word I've never used before and probably only heard once. The word acumen means the ability to think clearly and make good decisions.

It means that God is working on me to think clearly and make good decisions

title: Warfare With My Job
description:
On 25 August 2020, my mum and I had some conflicting views on how my life should turn. I had to give a strong no to her because she wasn't speaking by the Holy Spirit.

The lord is not an author of confusion, because he has told me in the time past not to go looking for Jobs because its gonna detour me from his call on my life. Of course, he has trained me in the art of programming so he was using that means to get me some jobs which one is more than a month salary.

Coming back home after youth service I've not been in the best place financially. The lord didn't abandoned me, I was in a much development stage and a little job could slow that speed down.

My mum was urging me to take up a job that I've seen won't be good for me, because it wasn't where God was taking me.

As our argument continued, I noticed she was speaking from a strange spirit, then I was also taken up by the Holy Spirit. The boldness of the Holy Spirit was so strong that I began quoting the word and speaking the word to that spirit, telling them that the Lord is not a liar. That he isn't gonna use me and abandon me. That he is working everything out for my good. That he hasn't told me to get a job. That he has already given me a work and a job, that I'm gonna wait on the lord to manifest on my behalf.

As I continued I also felt this anger in my spirit and everything about that situation pointed to me that the devils were trying to use emotional appeals and things pertaining to desires to remove me from the perfect will of God. But I stood my ground.

title: Faith Supplements - Word of the Lord as Torch Light and Virtues Focused on Self-Control, Patience Endurance & Mercy
description:
On 12 November 2020, I received this understanding that the word of the lord is a torch light searching through my soul. This happened while meditating on Faith's Ladder virtues in 2 Pet 1:5-9. I saw a touch light searching through a deep dark space. Then the Holy Spirit some virtues I hadn't made much room for in my life.

This includes self-control, patient endurance & mercy. The Lord was telling me to work on those areas.

title: Miss's Guidance - Focus and Responsibility Towards Family Struggles
description:
Meanwhile, a woman we call Miss under the inspiration of the Holy Spirit spoke to me not to dwell on my siblings cases for long. She basically wanted me to put it together and don't lose my cool.

She also confirmed a word the lord had told me in the past. Basically she said that the responsibility of removing my family from struggles rest in my hand.

title: Miss's Guidance - Correction and Wisdom to Lead People Back to Lord
description: She told me with wisdom, I'm supposed to correct many people's steps back to the lord. This was an answer for asking the lord a word that day.

title: Charismata
description: On 26 December 2020, I heard the word charismata in my spirit as I got ready to do some studies. From the Merriam Webster dictionary it was defined to be an extraordinary power (as of healing) given a Christian by the Holy Spirit for the good of the church. Charismata speaks of free gifts of Holy Spirit giving to believers.

title: Blood Shortage
description:
On 21 December 2020, the Lord told me why I was feeling weak, tired, and dizzy. He said its because I have a low blood supply.

Although, I suspected that this my physical situation was as a result of the ten days fasten I engaged with no balanced food supplements.

title: Poverty Alleviation
description: On 10 December 2020, while praying in the Spirit, commanding my blessings and enforcing God's will into my life, I heard the phrase, 'Poverty Alleviation'

title: Touched By Our Infirmities
description:
On 12 December 2020, I took an afternoon nap because of the effects of Shiloh on my sleeping pattern. When I woke up, I felt weak like someone that's about to be ill. I heard in my spirit, "touched by our infirmities." I looked it up in the scriptures and I found a match in this verse:

King James Version Hebrews 4:15 For we have not an high priest which cannot be touched with the feeling of our infirmities; but was in all points tempted like as we are, yet without sin.
New Living Translation Hebrews 4:15 This High Priest of ours understands our weaknesses, for he faced all of the same testings we do, yet he did not sin. I knew it was the lord speaking to me that he understands me and the weakness I felt. But of course, he has paid for my healing and there is no way I'm getting sick.

title: Manitoba
description: On 10 December 2020, I woke up from my bed. I heard this clear cut word, Manitoba.

title: Fulfillment of God's Will for Canada
description: On 1 December 2020, after the Lord has quickened me to start preparing for Canada by a call from Sir. Niza I made up my mind to do whatever it takes to fulfill this will of God for my life. I asked the lord for help and he led me to three things I've have to do which are information, understanding, and implementing. I asked where I could get reliable information; He said in my heart 'search on the internet.' As soon as I turned on my data connection a WhatsApp message from a group popped up saying "Google it". A person in that group was asking for an information while some other persons replied with Google it. Just like what is going on inside me head at this moment. As soon as i googled, it was amazing how God lead me to the right informations. This experience proved so much amazement because you can't say that wasn't a coincidence but I know it's not. That experience proves very well for me and made my believe in God's will.

title: The Tempter
description: On 30 May 2020, I was tempted by the devil to trivialise what God has been doing in my life. He came asking me questions about the physical things God has done for me. He presented a false image to me about the physical things I've not received. At that time I suspected that the voice I was hearing was wrong. So I said in a simple term, my life has become better ever since I became one with God. With that reply he flee from me. It was easy for me to see how my life was and how it is now and what it will turn out. Later on when I was reading Matt 4, the Holy Spirit told me that the tempter visited me and I passed his temptation.

title: Whack their Hornets
description:
On 26 September 2020, while I was walking to go ease myself in the morning I heard the word, "Whack their Hornets". Hornets are stinging insects with venomous poison capable of inflicting pains on you.

In the old testament hornets are one of the major insects the Lord uses to drive out people from a land. Exo 23:28, Deut 7:20, Josh 24:12.
What makes the creature dangerous is its ability to sting. In the new testament, stinging creatures were strongly linked to demons. Luke 10:19, Rev 9:1-12.

To whack means to hit (someone or something) with great force. To whack their Hornets was a term I heard a lot from Kevin Zadai when he talks of stirring up demons and inflicting pains on them. 
I didn't really understand the term until this research. By hearing that word in my heart, I'm told to pray in spirit specifically warfare prayers.

title: Railing Accusations
description: On 21 September 2020, as I awoke early from sleep, a report came to my heart with the message "Railing Accusations". A further research led me to understand that the accuser and the slanderer of the brethren has been making accusations against me to the Lord and so far has been failing epically. It's the Lord himself who has authorized me to do his bidden on the earth by winning souls daily. The evil one is so mad that I'm depopulating his kingdom because he is never getting the won souls, so he resort on laying accusations on me in the court of heaven. Jude 1:9, 2 Pet 2:11.

title: Reviving the Soul
description:
On 10 September 2020, the spoke this word into my heart, "Reviving the soul". I checked it and found a match from Ps 19:7
The Passion Translation Psalm 19:7 God’s Word is perfect in every way; how it revives our souls! His laws lead us to truth, and his ways change the simple into wise.
I asked the Holy Spirit for meaning and he told me while praying in Spirit and meditating on that scripture:
He said that "God is saying that you can trust his word to perform what he has said". This was addressing and encouraging me to continue trusting the words he has given me even when things don't look like what he promised me.

title: The Permission to Sift
description:
On 2 September 2020, while meditating on psalm 139, the word 'sift' jump right in and took me to Luke 22:31. “Peter, my dear friend, listen to what I’m about to tell you. Satan has demanded to come and sift you like wheat and test your faith.

This was the scripture that beckoned on me when I came in touch with the word titled 'sift' in Ps 139:23 TPT. The Lord started revealing things to me concerning the permission the devil has obtained to test me. I wasn't delighted with the news, but the Lord assured me of his help.

He even told me that job, and peter didn't have the Holy Spirit in them at that particular time of their temptation. I said in Holy anger, "if the devil wants to have a piece of me, then he should get ready to gag on me" because I'm not gonna be an easy target for him.

I see why I've had a lot of testing on my trust on God leading me to the right direction.

title: Declaring From My Book
description: On 3 May 2020, I will declare these things that has been written about from my book unto myself everyday. I'm having a production company called Gospany, it is for the advancement of God's works. I'm traveling to Canada for my master's degree program and more. I'm working strongly in the prophetic and healing anointing. I'm advancing testifiers and its used by innumerable people. My ministry is producing visual materials & apps for training and promotion God's works on the earth. I'm speaking to billions of people about God's doing in my life and his kingdom. My products are getting to the right people that needs them in high scale. I'm getting people in touch with their gifts, talents, and skills in high scale. I'm funding people's life to produce good fruits in high scale. I'm funding God's works all around the world to bring Jesus his reward.

title: A Better Programmer
description: On 6 May 2020, I heard in my heart, the lord is making you a better programmer

title: Accolade
description:
On 16 October 2020, while fishing the word of the Lord came to me saying, "Accolade". I had no understanding about the meaning of the word so I later checked it out and found this: An award, acknowledgment or a formal expression of praise. With a synonym of commendation.

The Holy Spirit was telling me that the Lord is commending me for my good works. I didn't immediately believe that until I did a little digging in the scriptures and found that it is the character of the Lord commend people 2 Cor 10:18.
I also found out from the gospels that one of the Lords favorite words is "well done good and faithful servant".

From the Lords messages to the seven churches in the book of revelation also revealed that the lord commended some of the churches for their good works. And last, the experience of Cornelius the centurion in Act 10:4 also reveal to me that the Lord gives accolades.
And this was the morning I began teaching students the ways of God in county high school.

title: Giving, Receiving, & Honoring
description:
On 18 October 2020, the Lord heavily unveiled mysteries to me concerning giving, receiving, and honoring him using Pst. David Ibeyomie's teaching on:

The Lord Speaking:
Recognize the authorities and rankings of men of God in this kingdom and grow in their anointing, graces and blessings. Heb 7:7
Understand the principle of potential differences and tailor that to men of God.

The anointing you don't place value on, you also don't receive from it.
God always sends a prophet to people in times of hardship. You don't beg into their grace, you tap into their graces by sowing something valuable first. Elijah 
Never meet a man of God empty handed!!!

Caring for them takes care of your cares. If you've done it to the least of your brethren you've done it to me too. Matt 25:40, Matt 10:40-42

The Lord spoke those words to me after I asked him for the person I should give some money to. He showed me a fella that couldn't pay me back.
I couldn't believe he was in front of me all these while, but before I could finish asking the lord to show me the person, my eyes was just locked up to him.

It was very interesting that this person suited the criteria of Matt 25:40
At the closing of the service, I drew him to a corner and gave him the little money, and I could tell that he was so surprise. Matt 6:1-4

title: My Father
description:
On 27 October 2020, I heard in my spirit like a deep cry "My Father" while worshipping God in the spirit during the church service. Makes me remember Rom 8:15, Gal 4:6
At this point I could see in my mind the Father seated on his throne. And I was kneeling down with my face on his laps and his hand was on my hair comforting me.
The Passion Translation Galatians 4:6 
and so that we would know for sure that we are his true children, God released the Spirit of Sonship into our hearts—moving us to cry out intimately, “My Father! You’re our true Father!”
In the Aramaic the term Abba Father means My Father.

title: The Spirit Upon
description:
On 8 November 2020, before going to church I told God to give me a word and a confirmation concerning my life, and his promises for me specifically in the area of finances. It came to past that Pst. David Ibeyomie was preaching about how the Lord never leave our problems unattended when called upon in worship. The Holy Spirit drew my attention to the following words of the pastor.

When you know your connection with God you don't panic! When a man rises by the hand of God he knows where his promotion came from and boast not on his efforts. When a man rises by covenant of God he forsakes not gospel, for he knows where his wealth come from. As I worshipped God presenting my requests to him, I had so many assurances in my heart, and Spirit of God was strong upon me that body hardened and began prophesying scripture.

New Living Translation Isaiah 11:1-3 A Branch from David’s Line Out of the stump of David’s family will grow a shoot—yes-a new branch bearing fruit from old root. And spirit Lord rest on him—the Spirit wisdom understanding, counsel might knowledge fear God delight obeying not judge appearance nor make decision based hearsay.

In fourth service came strong again upon me and prophesied verse again. The Passion Translation Luke 4:18-19 ‘Spirit the Lord is upon me anointed to be hope for poor brokenhearted new eyes prisoners You are set free! I come share message Jubilee time God great acceptance begun.’ Confirms my calling from God three words reassured commitment finances also tells that formed a shoot lineage made.

title: Rendezvous with the Lord
description:
On 24 November 2020, after I had just gotten back from ph, from a meeting with my Dr. Constance. I was apologizing to the lord for my droplets of doubts & anxieties. The lord used that meeting to give me financial provisions I've been asking for.

Then I heard in my spirit the word 'rendezvous', I didn't understand the meaning so I checked it out in the dictionary and I saw this:
A meeting with someone that is arranged for a particular time and place, and that is often secret.

Then it dawned on me that the lord has set up this appointment again. A sign that he is still with me and to prove to me that he's not joking about his commitment.

title: Not Being Mixed With Faith
description: On 12 November 2020, David Paschal texted me that his mother is getting better from an illness that was terrible yesterday before applying a scriptural instruction I gave to him by the Spirit. I told him to take an anointing oil rub over his mum and declare what he wants her condition to be. I never heard anything from him again until this morning. I myself was shocked, I thought he didn't do it, but he did. As I remembered that scenario, the lord put a word in me, "not being mixed with faith" Heb 4:2. The word tells me because he believed what I said and obeyed, the word of God profited him.

title: My Birthday Gift and Blessings
description: On 17 September 2020, a day before my birthday, I asked the Lord for a birthday gift that will help end a lot people from him. Now on my birthday I had three people call me and prayed for me with each person declaring blessings of wisdom, understanding, knowledge, insight, and discernment. And later on the Lord ministered to me on Prov 2. Three persons is a symbolism of the trinity, and their blessings of wisdom are the gifts that helps a lot of people. This blessings happened three times which indicates bountiful blessings from the lord directly. Num 24:10 The callers were Mummy Victor, Sir. Niza, and Daniel. With this I believe that the Lord has graced me with Wisdom and everything that comes with him.

title: Oholiab - God's Temple
description:
On 11 October 2020, while walking down to church, the Lord spoke this word to me, "Oholiab". Him and Bazalel were the noted craftsmen engraved by God to implement the work of the tabernacle.

I remembered that name from Exo 31:6 and this was what the Lord said from that verse:

“And I have personally appointed Oholiab son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan, to be his assistant. Moreover, I have given special skill to all the gifted craftsmen so they can make all the things I have commanded you to make: This scripture is part of Exo 31:1-10 where God chose and filled him with the Spirit of God and of wisdom to make the crafts needed for His Tabernacle on Earth.

Looking deeper into the meaning of the name, I found out from a strong concordance that Oholiab means "tent of his father". That also reckoned me as God's temple.

title: Itinerary - Lord's Word and Journey Planning
description: On 23 July 2020, the lord spoke to my heart of this word "itinerary" 9 days before my departure from Imo state. The word means the places you go to or plan to go to on a journey; also: a document in which the places you'll be going to are listed. I've never used that word before and certainly had no idea what it meant. Now I understand that my journey has been well planned by the lord, there is no mistake about it.

title: The Girl With The Quotes
description:
On 18 October 2020, Quoting God's words with understanding brings favor, rewards, and promotions. The girl with the quotes. When you display God's words, he rewards you with blessings! 

The Holy Spirit spoke to me about this when an 8 years old girl spoke quotes from about 32 books of him.

With an exceeding happiness in his heart, David Ibeyomie granted her scholarship for who knows how long.

The Holy Spirit started telling me a lot concerning how the Father loves it when we quote his words from the depth of our hearts. 
It proves to him that his words has become part of us, this causes him to bless us.

title: When He Ain't Siding You On GoShop offline and organizing another session, I found that he wasn't pointing me in the direction because he wouldn't even give a teaching. So he got me to dismiss it.
description: On 15 October 2020, while asking the Holy Spirit for the new teaching for GoShop offline, I saw that he wasn't siding with me again. He didn't give me anymore topic because he told me last week Thursday that I should end GoShop offline and I did. But my thinking got me to try organizing another session then I found that he wasn't pointing me in that direction because he wouldn't even give a teaching. So he got me to dismiss the learning.

title: The Supernatural Device ( block content and example interpretation of events with spiritual significance, as explained by the author based on their understanding from a religious or personal perspective. The examples given include Peter catching fish using an unordinary hook that turned into something special due to obedience leading to good outcomes such as tax being paid for it; another where disciples turning water in empty drums resulted in wine and brought about marriage blessings through following divine instructions with the results described as 'divine as well' when one obeys a higher power or set of principles. )
